Doomer.description:
Combat Start: Mark all enemies with Doom.

The first time enemies are damaged each combat, their Doom is consumed, stealing @ADAP1@% Attack Damage and Ability Power from them and granting it to your strongest Vex.

Challenger.description:
Your team gains @TeamwideAS*100@% Attack Speed. Challengers gain bonus Attack Speed. When their target dies, Challengers dash to a new target and increase their Attack Speed bonus by @BurstPercent*100@% for @BurstDuration@ seconds.

(@MinUnits@) @AttackSpeedPercent*100@% %i:scaleAS%
(@MinUnits@) @AttackSpeedPercent*100@% %i:scaleAS%
(@MinUnits@) @AttackSpeedPercent*100@% %i:scaleAS%
(@MinUnits@) @AttackSpeedPercent*100@% %i:scaleAS%

Choose Trait.description: When you field Miss Fortune, choose between Conduit Mode, Challenger Mode, and Replicator Mode. Miss Fortune has a unique ability based on her mode and gains the associated trait.

Stargazer.description:
Stargazers chart a different constellation every game.

Stargazers in empowered hexes gain various bonuses, starting at (@MinUnits@) units.

More hexes reveal at each player level.

Replicator.description:
Replicator abilities occur a second time at reduced effectiveness.

(@MinUnits@) @Effectiveness*100@% strength

Vanguard.description:
Vanguards gain @DamageReductionPct*100@% Durability while Shielded.

Combat start and @HealthThreshold*100@% Health: Gain a max Health Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds.

(@MinUnits@) @ShieldPercentAmount*100@% max Health
(@MinUnits@) @ShieldPercentAmount*100@% max Health
(@MinUnits@) @ShieldPercentAmount*100@% max Health;
@EnhancedDurability*100@% %i:scaleDR% while Shielded

Psionic.description:
Gain Psionic items that can be equipped to any ally.

(@MinUnits@) Gain the @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT17_PsyOps_Item1@
(@MinUnits@) Gain the @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT17_PsyOps_Item2@, Psionic items gain extra effects on Psionic units

Eradicator.description: Enemies have @PctResists*100@% less Armor and Magic Resist.

Timebreaker.description:
(@MinUnits@) When you lose, gain free rerolls. When you win, store XP in a Temporal Core (scales with stage).
(@MinUnits@) AND Allies gain @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed.
(@MinUnits@) AND Timebreakers gain an additional @TimebreakerAdditionalAS*100@% Attack Speed

Rerolls on Loss: @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT17_Timebreaker_NumRerollsTooltip@
XP on Win: @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT17_Timebreaker_NumXPTooltip@

Marauder.description:
Your team gains @TeamwideBonus*100@% Omnivamp. Marauders gain more Omnivamp, Attack Damage, and their Omnivamp overhealing is converted into Shield (up to @MaxPercentHealthShield*100@% max Health.)

(@MinUnits@) @Omnivamp*100@% %i:scaleSV%, @AD*100@% %i:scaleAD%
(@MinUnits@) @Omnivamp*100@% %i:scaleSV%, @AD*100@% %i:scaleAD%
(@MinUnits@) @Omnivamp*100@% %i:scaleSV%, @AD*100@% %i:scaleAD%.

Gun Goddess.description: When you field Miss Fortune, choose between Conduit Mode, Challenger Mode, and Replicator Mode. Miss Fortune has a unique ability based on her mode and gains the associated trait.

Anima.description:
After losing a player combat, gain @TechPerCombat@ Tech, plus additional Tech equal to @TechPerLoss@ times the length of your loss streak. Additionally, gain @TechPerKill@ Tech per Anima takedown.

Each time Animas get @TechBreakpoint@ Tech, they prototype new Anima Weapons. You can take them, or save your Tech to get more powerful weapons next time.

(@MinUnits@) Start Researching!
(@MinUnits@) After winning a player combat, gain loot!

Fateweaver.description:
Innate: Fateweavers have Precision.

(@MinUnits@) Chance effects on abilities are Lucky.
(@MinUnits@) Gain @CritChance*100@% Crit Chance and @CritDamage@% Crit Damage. Critical strikes are also Lucky.

{{TFT_Keyword_Precision}}
Lucky: Check twice and take the better outcome.

Galaxy Hunter.description:
Zed is obtained from the Invader Zed augment.

While at least one clone is alive, Zed gains @BonusAD*100@% bonus Attack Damage.

Bulwark.description: Summon a placeable relic. At the start of combat, it grants adjacent allies a @PercentHealthShield*100@% max Health shield and @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed.

Commander.description: (@MinUnits@) Sona gives you a random Command Mod every @RoundsPerMod@ rounds which allows you to alter the way an ally behaves during combat. Command Mods last @RoundsPerMod@ player combats even if they are not equipped.

Rogue.description:
Rogues gain Attack Damage and Ability Power. The first time they fall below @HealthThreshold*100@% health, they slip into shadows. Enemies targeting them are redirected to a nearby unit, preferring Tanks.

(@MinUnits@) @AP@% %i:scaleAD% %i:scaleAP%
(@MinUnits@) @AP@% %i:scaleAD% %i:scaleAP%
(@MinUnits@) @AP@% %i:scaleAD% %i:scaleAP%
(@MinUnits@) @AP@% %i:scaleAD% %i:scaleAP%

Dark Star.description:
(@MinUnits@) Dark Stars create a black hole that consumes enemies at @ExecuteHPPercent*100@% max health.
(@MinUnits@) AND they gain @ADAP@% %i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%.
(@MinUnits@) AND the strongest Dark Star unit goes supermassive, gaining @SupermassivePercentBonus*100@% effectiveness from Dark Star, and creates 2 minor Black Holes.
(@MinUnits@) All Dark Stars are supermassive. At level 10, CONSUME EVERYONE.

Primordian.description:
(@MinUnits@) Dealing damage spawns Swarmlings based on unique Primordian star level.
(@MinUnits@) Spawn @PercentMoreSwarmlings@% more Swarmlings! After each player combat, gain a random 1 or 2-cost champion.

@DamageTakenPercentModifier*100@% of damage taken contributes to damage dealt.

Space Groove.description:
(@MinUnits@) Groovians can enter {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_TheGroove}}. While in it, they gain Attack Speed and max Health Regen, increased per Groovian on your team.
(@MinUnits@) All Groovians start combat in {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_TheGroove}} for @StartOfCombatDuration@ seconds.
(@MinUnits@) Each second spent in {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_TheGroove}} grants @ADAPPerSecond@% stacking Attack Damage and Ability Power.
(@MinUnits@) Increase these effects by @EffectBonus@%!
(@MinUnits@) {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_Groove}}

{{TFT17_SpaceGroove_TheGroove}}: @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT17_SpaceGroove_AS*100@% %i:scaleAS%, @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT17_SpaceGroove_HealthRegen*100@% %i:scaleHPRegen%

Arbiter.description:
Scribe a unique divine law, allowing you to choose an effect to apply to Arbiters when a chosen cause occurs.

(@MinUnits@) Choose a cause and effect for your law
(@MinUnits@) Effects are stronger.

Shepherd.description:
Shepherds summon the Bond of the Stars to aid them in battle.

(@MinUnits@) Summon Bia
(@MinUnits@) Summon Bayin
(@MinUnits@) Bia and Bayin's bond grows deeper

Bia and Bayin's power are increased by the total star level of all Shepherds.

Redeemer.description:
(@MinUnits@) For each non-unique trait you have active, your team gains @BonusOffensiveStat1*100@%/@BonusOffensiveStat2*100@%/@BonusOffensiveStat3*100@% Attack Speed, and @BonusDefensiveStat1@/@BonusDefensiveStat2@/@BonusDefensiveStat3@ Armor and Magic Resist.

Teamwide Attack Speed: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT17_RhaastUnique_OffensiveStatToGain@% %i:scaleAS%
Teamwide Resists: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT17_RhaastUnique_DefensiveStatToGain@ %i:scaleArmor%%i:scaleMR%

Brawler.description:
Your team gains @TeamwideBonus*100@% Health. Brawlers gain more.

(@MinUnits@) +@HealthBonus*100@% maximum Health

Bastion.description:
Your team gains @TeamwideResists@ Armor and Magic Resist.

Bastions gain more, and the value doubles in the first @Duration@ seconds of combat.

(@MinUnits@) @BonusArmor@ %i:scaleArmor%%i:scaleMR%
(@MinUnits@) @BonusArmor@ %i:scaleArmor%%i:scaleMR%
(@MinUnits@) @BonusArmor@ %i:scaleArmor%%i:scaleMR%; Non-Bastions gain an additional @EnhancedTeamwideArmor@ %i:scaleArmor%%i:scaleMR%.

Meeple.description:
Meeple attract Meeps that empower Meeple abilities in meepy ways. They also gain bonus Health.

(@MinUnits@) @Meeps@ %i:set14AmpIcon%, @BonusHealth@ %i:scaleHealth%
(@MinUnits@) @Meeps@ %i:set14AmpIcon%, @BonusHealth@ %i:scaleHealth%
(@MinUnits@) @Meeps@ %i:set14AmpIcon%, @BonusHealth@ %i:scaleHealth%. Create a Cloning Slot on your bench. Gain gold and a 1-star copy of the champion placed there when cloning completes.
(@MinUnits@) @Meeps@ %i:set14AmpIcon%, @BonusHealth@ %i:scaleHealth%. SUMMON THE FOUR MEEPLORDS!

Cloning time = Champion cost

Conduit.description:
Innate: Conduits gain @InnateManaGain*100@% additional Mana from all sources.

Your team gains Mana Regen, increased for Conduits.

(@MinUnits@) @TeamManaRegen@ %i:TFTManaRegen% | @ChannelerManaRegen@ %i:TFTManaRegen%

Mecha.description:
Innate: Mecha units can transform into their Ultimate form, upgrading their ability and gaining @TransformedPercentHealth*100@% Health. Transformed Mechas take up two team slots and count twice for the Mecha trait.

(@MinUnits@) Energy Cells: Mechas gain @AP@% %i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%.
(@MinUnits@) Overclocked Cells: Increased to @AP@% %i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%.
(@MinUnits@) Precision Engineering: +@TeamSize@ max team size

Use the Mecha-Former item to toggle the forms of your Mecha units

Factory New.description:
After participating in combat, open an armory to purchase a permanent upgrade for your strongest Graves.

Every @NumberOfUpgradesBeforeRoundCostIncrease@ upgrades, future upgrades will take an additional round.

Next Upgrade: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT17_GravesTrait_RoundsUntilUpgrade@ Rounds.

Voyager.description:
Combat Start: Your Tanks gain a Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds. Your other allies gain Damage Amp.

Voyagers gain double.

(@MinUnits@) @ShieldHP@ Shield; @BonusDA*100@% %i:scaleDA%

Party Animal.description: Once per combat, after falling below @HealthThreshold*100@% percent Health, become untargetable and repair @PercentHealthHeal*100@% max Health per second. Upon reaching full Health, or when no other allies remain, return to combat. If fully healed, for the rest of combat Blitzcrank is in {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_TheGroove}} and Party Crasher's passive fires bolts four times as fast.

N.O.V.A..description:
(@MinUnits@) @TeamAttackDelay@ seconds into combat, N.O.V.A. grant a power surge to allies based on champions.
(@MinUnits@) Gain a Striker selector. The chosen N.O.V.A. activates their Strike during the power surge.

Aatrox: Ally Damage @ShredAndSunder*100@% Shred and Sunders enemiesAatrox: Shred and Sunder enemies
Caitlyn: Grant allies @AS*100@% Attack SpeedCaitlyn: Grant Attack Speed
Akali: Allies gain PrecisionAkali: Allies gain Precision
Maokai: Allies heal @Heal*100@% max HealthMaokai: Heal allies
Kindred: Shield the strongest Tank for @ShieldValue@Kindred: Shield an ally
Emblem: Allies deal @BonusTrueDamage*100@% stacking bonus true damageEmblem: Deal bonus true damage

Oracle.description:
Every @Rounds@ rounds, Tahm Kench grants a reward!

Rounds Remaining: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT17_TahmKench_RoundsRemaining@
Last Reward: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT17_TahmKench_LastReward@

Sniper.description:
Snipers gain Damage Amp, increased against targets farther away.

(@MinUnits@) @PercentDamageIncrease@% %i:scaleDA%; +@PerHexIncrease@% %i:scaleDA% per hex
(@MinUnits@) @PercentDamageIncrease@% %i:scaleDA%; +@PerHexIncrease@% %i:scaleDA% per hex
(@MinUnits@) @PercentDamageIncrease@% %i:scaleDA%; +@PerHexIncrease@% %i:scaleDA% per hex

Divine Duelist.description:
Your Tactician heals for @PlayerOmnivamp*100@% of player damage dealt from winning.

Fiora always wins a one on one duel.

Dark Lady.description: Allies take @UntransformedAbilityDA*100@% less damage from abilities, increased to @TransformedAbilityDA*100@% while Morgana is in Dark Form.

Trait: Reunion.description:
When Vi casts, Ekko releases 3 afterimages towards her target dealing @EkkoAfterImageReducedDamage*100@% damage. When Ekko casts, Vi slams an earthquake towards his target dealing @ViEarthquakeReducedDamage*100@% damage.

Gain a Vi and Ekko.

Bruiser Crown.description: Gain a Bruiser Emblem, a Spirit Visage, and a Sylas.

Crimson Pact.description: Gain a Vladimir. Your strongest Vladimir gains +@IncRange@ Range and gains @BonusMana@ bonus Mana each attack. His Ability no longer heals but grants @TOOLTIPDamageAmp*100@% Damage Amp, deals @TOOLTIPBonusDamage*100@% bonus damage, and spreads additional damage to the nearest enemy.

Rocket Collection.description: Artillerist rockets deal @IncreasedRocketDamage*100@% increased damage. Every @RocketDamageThreshold@ rockets your Artillerists fire, gain a Collector (max @MaxItems@). Gain a Tristana and Urgot. (Rockets Fired: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT13_Augment_Artillerist_TotalDamage@)

Trait: Unlikely Duo.description:
Jinx and Sevika gain @AD*100@% Attack Damage and @Health@ Health. Whenever one casts, they grant the other @Mana@ mana. Sevika's arm is luckier.

Gain a Jinx and Sevika.

Domination.description: Dominators gain @ShieldPercentAS*100@% Attack Speed while shielded. When a Dominator gets a kill, all Dominators gain @ShieldAmount@ Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds. Gain a Cassiopeia.

Sniper's Nest.description: Snipers gain @DamageAmp@% Damage Amp for each combat fought from the same starting hex, up to @MaxAmp@%. Gain an Ezreal and a Gnar.

Artillerist Crown.description: Gain an Artillerist Emblem, a Runaan's Hurricane, and a Tristana.

Firelight Crest.description: Gain a Firelight Emblem and a Zeri.

Heavily Smash.description: Every @RefreshSeconds@ seconds, Bruisers deal @SlamPercentHealth*100@% bonus max Health bonus physical damage on their next attack. Gain a Steb and a Trundle.

Forbidden Magic.description: Every @NumTakedownsPerStack@ takedowns by Black Rose champions or Sion grant Sion permanent @SionADPercentPerStack*100@% Attack Damage and @SionHealthPerStack@ Max Health. Gain 3 Black Rose champions. (Stacks: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT13_Augment_Cabal_NumStacks@)

Watcher Crest.description: Gain a Watcher Emblem and a Vander.

Battle Scars.description: Every time Watchers are attacked, they gain @IncreaseADByTakeAttack@% Attack Damage. Every time Watchers are hit by an ability, they gain @IncreaseAPByTakeSpell@ Ability Power. Gain a Vander.

Trait: Geniuses.description:
When Heimerdinger casts, Ekko releases @NumEkkoAfterImages@ afterimages, each dealing @ReducedEkkoDamage*100@% damage. When Ekko casts, Heimerdinger fires @NumHeimerMissiles@ missiles, each dealing @ReducedHeimerDamage*100@% damage.

Gain a Heimerdinger, Ekko, and a Jeweled Gauntlet.

This WILL Work.description: Gain a Powder. Your strongest Powder's explosion radius is increased by two hexes, has different damage falloff, but deals @TOOLTIPONLYFriendlyDamage@% damage to ALLIES.

Black Rose Crown.description: Gain a Black Rose Emblem, a Spear of Shojin, and a Cassiopeia.

Conqueror Crown.description: Gain a Conqueror Emblem, a Last Whisper, and a Rell.

Trait: Betrayal.description:
Maddie always targets Ambessa's target with her Ability and attacks. Every round where either gets at least @NumKills@ kills, gain a Maddie.

Gain a 2-star Maddie and Ambessa.

Enforcer Crown.description: Gain an Enforcer Emblem, an Infinity Edge, and a Maddie.

Academic Research.description: Whenever you build an item, gain a completed item anvil instead. That anvil always offers an Academy item and the item built. Gain @NumItems@ random components. Gain a Lux and an Ezreal.

Loot Explosion.description: Ambusher kills have a chance to drop loot, scaling with Critical Strike Chance. The value of the loot given can also critically strike, granting even more loot. Gain a Camille and a Powder.

Scrap Crown.description: Gain a Scrap Emblem, a Ziggs, and @NumComponents@ random components.

A Golden Find.description: Champions evolved by the Anomaly drop @GoldPerRequirement@ gold every @NumKillsRequirement@ kills. Gain @FreeRerolls@ free rerolls.

Pit Fighter Crown.description: Gain a Pit Fighter Emblem, a Sterak's Gage, and a Gangplank.

Law Enforcement.description: Enforcer champions gain @BonusAD*100@% Attack Damage. Every @WantedEnemyBreakpoint@ Wanted enemy deaths grant @BonusGoldAmount@ gold. Gain a Steb and Maddie.

Automata Crown.description: Gain an Automata Emblem, a Guardbreaker, and a Nocturne.

Sorcerer Crown.description: Gain a Sorcerer Emblem, a Jeweled Gauntlet, and an Ahri.

Mad Chemist.description: Gain a Singed. Your strongest Singed cannot attack but constantly runs, leaving a poison trail dealing magic damage over time. His Ability will always target himself and instead grants @TOOLTIPONLYOmnivamp@% Omnivamp and Move Speed.

Voidcaller.description:
For every @Mana@ Mana Visionaries spend during combat, summon a Voidling, up to @MaxVoidlings@ Voidlings. Gain a Rell and Morgana.

The Voidling has @Stage2Health@-@Stage6Health@ Health based on Stage.

Firelight Crown.description: Gain a Firelight Emblem, a Protector's Vow, and a Scar.

Trait: What Could Have Been.description:
Vander gains @MaxHealthGainPerCast@ permanent max Health each time Silco casts. Silco gains @APGainPerDeath@ permanent Ability Power each time Vander dies.

Gain a 2-star Vander, a Silco, and a Spear of Shojin.

Aerial Warfare.description: Firelight champions gain @FirelightBonusAD*100@% Attack Damage and @FirelightBonusAP@ Ability Power when they start a Firelight dash. They gain another @Bonus@% for every hex traveled that combat. Gain a Scar and Zeri.

Trait: Sisters.description:
Gain the Sister Trait. When Vi scores a takedown, Jinx gains @ASBuff*100@% bonus Attack Speed for @JinxDuration@ seconds. When Jinx scores a takedown, Vi gains @ADBuff*100@% bonus Attack Damage for @ViDuration@ seconds.

Gain a Vi and Jinx.

Another Anomaly.description: After the Anomaly round on 4-6, gain an item that duplicates the chosen Anomaly Effect onto the equipped champion.

Quickstriker Crown.description: Get a Quickstriker Emblem, an Ashe, and a Kraken's Fury.

Visionary Crown.description: Gain a Visionary Emblem, a Spear of Shojin, and a Renata Glasc.

Shield Bash.description: Sentinels gain @PercGain*100@% bonus Armor and Magic Resist. Every @Interval@ seconds, their next attack deals @ResistToDamageRatio*100@% of their total resistances as magic damage. Gain a Loris.

Sniper Crown.description: Gain a Sniper Emblem, an Infinity Edge, and a Caitlyn.

Experiment Crest.description: Gain an Experiment Emblem and an Urgot.

Family Crown.description: Gain a Family Emblem and a Redemption.

Chem-Baron Crest.description: Gain a Chem-Baron Emblem and a Renata Glasc.

What You Really Are.description:
Gain a Bloodthirster. After you deal @PlayerDamage@ damage to other players, gain a Warwick and a Sterak's Gage.
(Current: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT13_Augment_WarwickDamageCount@)

Glorious Evolution.description:
Gain an Adaptive Helm. After you upgrade @NumUpgrades@ champions, gain a Viktor and a Jeweled Gauntlet.
(Current: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT13_Augment_GrantViktor@)

Arcane Retribution.description: When Sorcerers die, they deal @DeathPercentage*100@% of their Ability Power as magic damage to all adjacent units. Gain a Vladimir and Lux.

Sentinel Crest.description: Gain a Sentinel Emblem and a Senna.

Brutal Revenge.description: Gain 2 Rennis. Your strongest Renni's Ability costs @TOOLTIPManaReduction@ less and causes her to lunge towards the farthest enemy within @TOOLTIPHexDistance@ hexes, dealing @TOOLTIPAbilityDamage*100@% damage to the target and reduced damage to enemies in her path.

Gloves Off.description: Gain a Vander. Your strongest Vander gains a brand new Ability that no longer grants resistances, but deals @TOOLTIPBonusDamage*100@% increased damage and punches the target backwards, dealing @TOOLTIPONLYSplashPerc*100@% of the original damage to all enemies hit.

Rebel Crest.description: Gain a Rebel Emblem and an Akali.

The Mutation Survives.description: Experiments gain @Health*100@% Health and grant a special hex. The Experiment in the hex is killed on combat start, granting their Experiment bonus to other laboratory hexes. Gain 3 Experiment champions.

Noxian Guillotine.description: Conquerors execute enemies below @BaseExecuteThreshold@% Health. When they do, they gain @ArmorandMagicResist@ Armor and Magic Resist for the rest of combat. Gain a Darius and Draven.

Academy Crown.description: Gain an Academy Emblem and a random sponsored item.

Watcher Crown.description: Gain a Watcher Emblem, a Steadfast Heart, and a Scar.

Adrenaline Burst.description: Combat start and every @TimeBetweenProcs@ seconds, all Quickstrikers attack @AttackSpeed*100@% faster for @BuffDuration@ seconds. Gain a Nocturne and Akali.

Why Not Both?.description: While you field 2 of the same Form Swapper in different forms, both gain @BonusStats@ Ability Power, Armor, and Magic Resist, and @BonusStats@% Attack Damage. When you 3-star a Form Swapper, gain a 2-star copy. Gain a Swain and Gangplank.

Top of the Scrap Heap.description:
Every @NumScrapItemsConverted@ components Scrap champions convert, gain a random component (max @MaxComponents@). Gain a Powder and a Trundle.

Converted: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT13_Augment_Scrap_NumComponents@/@NumScrapItemsConverted@

Ambusher Crest.description: Gain an Ambusher Emblem and a Camille.

Welcome to the Playground.description: If at least @MinNumFamilyMembers@ Family members are alive after @TimeRequirement@ seconds in combat or at the end of combat, gain a random copy of a Vander, Powder, or Violet. Gain a Powder and Violet.

Dominator Crown.description: Gain a Dominator Emblem, a Protector's Vow, and a Blitzcrank.

War for the Undercity.description: Everytime you choose to save your Shimmer on a Black Market, heal @Heal@ player health and gain @Gold@ gold. Gain a Renni.

Rebel Crown.description: Gain a Rebel Emblem, a Jeweled Gauntlet, and an Akali.

Visionary Crest.description: Gain a Visionary Emblem and a Renata Glasc.

Combat Medic.description: Gain a Steb. Your strongest Steb's Ability's Mana cost is reduced by @ManaReduction@, but no longer heals. Steb's spell grants @TOOLTIPONLYOmnivamp@% Omnivamp and strikes 3 times, each dealing @TOOLTIPONLYModifiedDamage*100@%.

A Change Of Fate.description:
Gain a Blue Buff. After starting a round with @RoundGold@ gold and winning a player combat, gain a Mel and a Hextech Gunblade.

Tasks can be completed in any order.

Rocket Collection+.description: Artillerist rockets deal @IncreasedRocketDamage*100@% increased damage. Every @RocketDamageThreshold@ rockets your Artillerists fire, gain a Collector (max @MaxItems@). Gain a Tristana and Urgot. (Rockets Fired: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT13_Augment_Artillerist_TotalDamage@)

Bruiser Crest.description: Gain a Bruiser Emblem and a Jax.

Pit Fighter Crest.description: Gain a Pit Fighter Emblem and an Urgot.

Conqueror Crest.description: Gain a Conqueror Emblem and a Rell.

Trolling.description: Gain a Trundle. Your strongest Trundle's Ability no longer heals, but grants him @TOOLTIPONLYAS@% Attack Speed for @TOOLTIPONLYDuration@ seconds, and permanently grants him @TOOLTIPONLYADPerCast@% Attack Damage. His maximum mana is reduced by @ManaReduction@.

Ambusher Crown.description: Gain an Ambusher Emblem, a Hand of Justice, and a Camille.

Trait: Menaces.description:
While fielded with Silco, Powder gains Dominator, but no longer benefits from Family. When her monkey explodes, it creates @TOOLTIPONLYNumMonstrosities@ of Silco's monstrosities.

Gain a 2-star Powder and a Silco.

Guided Anomaly.description: Gain @FreeAnomalyRerolls@ free Anomaly rerolls. Unused rerolls are converted to gold. Gain @InitialGold@ gold now.

Training Arc.description: Pit Fighters permanently gain @ADPerLoss*100@% Attack Damage if they lost the last combat. If they won, gain @HealthPerWin@ Health instead. Gain an Urgot.

Chem-Baron Crown.description: Gain a Chem-Baron Emblem, a Nashor's Tooth, and a Smeech.

Blade Dance.description: Gain an Irelia. Your strongest Irelia gains @TOOLTIPBonusAS*100@% Attack Speed and gains a brand new Ability that dashes her between two targets, dealing physical damage to both.

Trait: Martial Law.description:
When Ambessa casts, Caitlyn fires an empowered attack at the target, dealing @TOOLTIPONLYCAITAD@% damage. Ambessa gains @TOOLTIPONLYADSHARE@% of Caitlyn's Attack Damage.

Gain a Caitlyn and Ambessa.

Sentinel Crown.description: Gain a Sentinel Emblem, a Giant Slayer, and a Senna.

Academy Crest.description: Gain an Academy Emblem and a Leona.

Artillerist Crest.description: Gain an Artillerist Emblem and a Tristana.

Dominator Crest.description: Gain a Dominator Emblem and a Blitzcrank.

Paint the Town Blue.description: When the first @NumOfUnits@ Rebels die each combat, summon a copy of themselves that is one-star lower with @ReducedHealth@ less Health. Gain an Akali and an Irelia.

Automata Crest.description: Gain an Automata Emblem and a Nocturne.

Experiment Crown.description: Gain an Experiment Emblem, a Bloodthirster, and an Urgot.

Fractured Crystals.description: When an Automata champion fires their blast, they fire a second blast at the closest enemy dealing @Percentage*100@% of the original damage. Gain an Amumu and Nocturne.

Scrap Crest.description: Gain a Scrap Emblem and a Ziggs.

Ekko's Boon.description: Gain the Anomaly, an item which grants units a powerful evolution depending on their role. Gain @NumRemovers_TOOLTIPONLY@ Magnetic Removers.

Soraka's Boon.description: Your team gains @HealthPerTacHealth@ Health for each missing player health. At the start of each player combat, gain an additional @Heal@ player health.

Anima Commander.description: Gain a Briar, a Jinx, and an Illaoi. Increase your current and max player Health by @PlayerHealth@.

Aurelion Sol's Boon.description:
Choose 1 of @NumQuestOptions_TOOLTIPONLY@ quests to prove yourself to Aurelion Sol.

Chosen Quest: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_Augment_AurelionSolGodAugment@

Your team gains @SmallQuestADAP@ Attack.description: Your team gains @SmallQuestADAP@ Attack Damage and Ability Power.

Heat Death.description: Gain a Mordekaiser. Your strongest Mordkaiser becomes a Magic Fighter with a slowly growing aura that deals damage over time.

Invader Zed.description:
Gain a Spear of Shojin. On Stage @StageNum@-@RoundNum@, gain a Zed. After receiving Zed, he can then appear in your shops.

Zed is a 5-cost Attack Fighter that creates clones of himself.
