Darkwill's Invasion.description: Your team gains @DamageAmp*100@% Damage Amp, increased to @EnhancedDamageAmp*100@% if the Noxus trait is active.

U.R.F.description: Gain a Spatula. Champions holding Spatula or Frying Pan items gain @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed and @ManaRegen@ Mana Regen.

Complete Collection.description: After you unlock @ChampsToEmblem@ champions from an origin, gain that origin's Emblem.

Artifact Expert: Luden's Tempest.description: Get a 2* Caitlyn , a Luden's Tempest, and a Recurve Bow

Hammer of Orlon.description: Gain an Illaoi. Your strongest Illaoi becomes a Fighter. Her Ability is replaced with an airborne slam that's recast when she kills her target.

Poison Pals.description: Gain a 2-star Teemo. Singed's damage refreshes Teemo's poisons, and every @TeemoDamageReq@ magic damage Teemo deals grants your strongest Singed @SingedAPGain@% Ability Power. Gain a Teemo after each player combat.

Walk The True Path I.description: Gain a Lesser Champion Duplicator and a Yasuo. Reach level 10 and field 10 unique Ionians to unlock a Prismatic Upgrade.

Demacia Circlet.description: Get a Demacia Emblem, a Garen, and a Needlessly Large Rod.

Warden Crown.description: Get a Warden Emblem, a Xin Zhao, and an Adaptive Helm.

Defender Crown.description: Get a Defender Emblem, a Neeko, and a Steadfast Heart.

Bringer of Ruin.description:
Every takedown Atakhan scores permanently grants him @AP@% Ability Power and @MaxHealth@ max Health. Gain a Briar and a Sion.
(Current Takedowns: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT16_Augment_Noxus_BringerOfRuin_Takedowns@)

Bruiser Circlet.description: Gain a Bruiser Emblem, a Gragas, and a Giant's Belt.

Zaun Crown.description: Get a Zaun Emblem, a Giant Slayer, and an Ekko.

Vorpal Spikes.description: Gain a Cho'Gath. Your strongest Cho'Gath gains +1 Attack Range and his attacks launch spikes that deal magic damage based on his max Health.

The Darkin Aegis.description:
The holder gains the Darkin trait.

Every second, deal @PercentHealthDamage@% of the holder's max Health as magic damage to enemies within @HexRadius@ hexes. When units die in the area, heal for @HealPercent*100@% max Health.

The Darkin Staff.description:
The holder gains the Darkin trait.

For every @ManaSpent@ Mana spent, launch a tendril at enemies near the current target, dealing @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT_Item_Artifact_DarkinStaff_Damage@ magic damage.

Damage increases based on Stage

The Trifarix.description: Your @NumChampions@ strongest champions gain @Health@ Health, @DamageAmp*100@% Damage Amp, and execute enemies under @ExecuteThreshold*100@% Health.

Warden Circlet.description: Get a Warden Emblem, a Braum, and a Giant's Belt.

The Ruined King.description: Gain a 2-star Viego. Your strongest Viego shares @PassiveSharePercent*100@% of his Passive with other Shadow Isles allies. After collecting @SoulReq@ souls, his Ability upgrades.

Artifact Expert: Manazane.description: Get a 2* Anivia, a Manazane , and a Tear Of The Goddess

Gunslinger Crown.description: Get a Gunslinger Emblem, a Tristana, and an Infinity Edge.

Yordle Crown.description: Get a Yordle Emblem, a Teemo, and a Rabadon's Deathcap.

Disruptor Circlet.description: Get a Disruptor Emblem, a Seraphine, and a Tear of the Goddess.

Spin to Win.description: Gain a Yasuo and Rek'Sai. Each time your spinning champions spend @ManaToSpend@ total Mana they permanently gain @Health@ Health and @DamageAmp*100@% Damage Amp. Fielding more increases their spin area by 1-hex.

Earth Axiom.description: Gain an Earth Hex. Champions within gain @Resistances@ Armor and Magic Resist. At @HealthThreshold*100@% Health, they Stun enemies within @HexRadius@ hexes for @StunDuration@ seconds.

Piltover Circlet.description: Get a Piltover Emblem, a Seraphine, and a Tear of the Goddess.

Freljord Circlet.description: Get a Freljord Emblem, a Lissandra, and a Needlessly Large Rod.

Artifact Expert: Zhonya's Paradox.description: Get a 2* Milio, a Zhonya's Paradox, and a Negatron Cloak

Keep Away.description: Longshots gain @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed. If they cast while their target is within @HexDistanceFromTarget@ hexes, the target is knocked back @KnockbackDistanceInHexes@ hexes (cooldown: @CooldownDuration@s). Gain a Caitlyn and a Kog'Maw.

Trials of Twilight.description: Gain @NumberOfCopies@ Xin Zhao. Your strongest Xin Zhao constantly strikes nearby enemies and executes enemies. After @RoundsBeforeTransformation@ player combats as a 3-star, unlock Zaahen. He replaces Xin Zhao and takes his items.

Artifact Expert: Fishbones.description: Get a 2* Ashe, a Fishbones, and a Sparring Gloves

Juggernaut Crown.description: Get a Juggernaut Emblem, a Spirit Visage, and a Dr. Mundo.

Vanquisher Crown.description: Get a Vanquisher Emblem, a Gangplank, and a Hand of Justice.

Disruptor Crown.description: Get a Disruptor Emblem, a Malzahar, and a Blue Buff.

Realm Warp.description:
Use on any champion to gain an emblem for each of their listed traits.

[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

The Darkin Bow.description:
The holder gains the Darkin trait.

Every @NumAttacks@ attacks, fire an arrow that passes through the current target, dealing @ArrowBaseADDamage*100@% Basic Attack Damage as physical damage, reduced by @ArrowPercentFalloff*100@% per enemy hit.

Artifact Expert: Deathfire Grasp.description: Get a 2* Kog'Maw, a Deathfire Grasp, and a Recurve Bow

Ixtal Expeditionist.description: Gain a Qiyana, a Neeko, and a Milio. Increase your current and max player Health by @PlayerHealth@.

Artifact Expert: Flickerblade.description: Get an Aphelios, a Flickerblade, and a Recurve Bow

Defense of the Placidium.description: Your team gains @Durability*100@% Durability, increased to @EnhancedDurability*100@% if the Ionia trait is active.

Artifact Expert: Hullbreaker.description: Get a 2* Xin Zhao, a Hullbreaker, and a Chain Vest

Trials of Twilight II.description:
Gain @NumberOfCopies@ Xin Zhao and a Bloodthirster. Xin Zhao becomes an Attack Fighter. After @RoundsBeforeTransformation@ player combats as a 3-star, unlock Zaahen.

At the start of the next @NumDuplicators@ stages, gain a Lesser Champion Duplicator.

Yordle Circlet.description: Get a Yordle Emblem, a Needlessly Large Rod, and...a Rabadon's Deathcap!?

Water Axiom.description: Gain a Water Hex. Champions within gain @ManaRegen@ Mana Regen. Their damage @ShredPercent*100@% Shreds enemies for @Duration@ seconds.

Dragonguards.description: Gain a Shyvana and a 2-star Jarvan IV. When Jarvan casts, Shyvana gains Shield. When Shyvana casts, Jarvan jumps in and deals damage based on his Armor and Magic Resist. After every player combat, gain a Jarvan IV.

Artifact Expert: Blighting Jewel.description: Get a Teemo, a Blighting Jewel, and a Needlessly Large Rod

Cosmic Calling.description: Gain a Spear of Shojin and a Leona. On Stage @StageNum@-@RoundNum@, gain a Taric.

Evolve and Overcome.description:
For every @NumTakedownsReq@ champions that Mutated Void allies takedown, gain @XP@ XP. Gain a Cho'Gath and a 2-star Kog'Maw. @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_EvolveAndOvercome_Tooltip@

Void provides unique Mutations.

Demacia Forever.description: Demacians gain @Health@ permanent Health every time they rally. They also gain @Stats@% permanent Attack Damage and Ability Power every @RallyCount@ rallies. Gain a Jarvan IV, a Sona, and a Xin Zhao.

Demacia Crown.description: Get a Demacia Emblem, a Crownguard, and a Jarvan IV.

Artifact Expert: The Indomitable.description: Get a Sion, The Indomitable, and a Giant Belt.

Total Domination.description:
Slayers gain @BaseDA*100@% Damage Amp, plus @DAPerBreakpoint*100@% for every @SurvivingSlayerBreakpoint@ surviving Slayers at the end of combat. Gain a Briar and a Qiyana.

Current Damage Amp: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT16_Augment_Slayer_TotalDomination_CurrentDA@%

Longshot Circlet.description: Get a Longshot Emblem, a Recurve Bow, and a Vayne.

Rocket Fist.description: Gain a Blitzcrank. Your strongest one becomes an Attack Fighter. His Ability no longer shields but instead fires a hook towards the furthest enemy and gains powerful punches for a set amount of attacks.

Air Axiom.description: Gain an Air Hex. Champions within gain @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed and their damage @SunderPercent*100@% Sunders enemies for @Duration@ seconds.

Vanquisher Circlet.description: Get a Vanquisher Emblem, an Ambessa, and a B.F. Sword.

Artifact Expert: Innervating Locket.description: Get a 2* Illaoi, a Innervating Locket, and a Giant Belt

Ixtal Crown.description: Get an Ixtal Emblem, a Neeko, and a Gargoyle Stoneplate.

Bandle Bounty II.description: For every Yordle you've unlocked or unlock, gain @Gold@ gold. Reach level 10 and field 10 unique Yordles to reveal the Bandle Path's secret. Gain a Tristana and Teemo.

Artifact Expert: Dawncore.description: Get a Teemo, a Dawncore, and a Tear Of The Goddess

Vision.description:
You will be offered Might and Guile augments this game. When you reach Level @LevelReq@, gain a random 5-cost champion, a completed item anvil, and a Champion Duplicator.

Collecting all 3 Tenet augments grants a powerful reward.

Wood Axiom.description: Gain a Wood Hex. Champions within gain @PercentHealth*100@% max Health. After combat, they permanently gain @PermanentHealth@ Health.

Fire Axiom.description: Gain a Fire Hex. Champions within gain @ADAP@% Attack Damage and Ability Power. Their damage @BurnPercent*100@% Burns and @GrievousWoundsPercent*100@% Wounds for @Duration@ seconds.

Hero of the Placidium.description: Strike enemies with telekinetic blades during combat, dealing damage and 30% Shredding and Sundering. Blade damage increases based on your total star level of Ionian champions.

Ixtal Circlet.description: Get an Ixtal Emblem, a Giant's Belt, and...a Lesser Duplicator!?

Juggernaut Circlet.description: Gain a Juggernaut Emblem, an Udyr, and a Giant's Belt.

Freljord Crown.description: Get a Freljord Emblem, a Hextech Gunblade, and an Anivia.

Artifact Expert: Prowler's Claw.description: Get a 2* RekSai, a Prowler's Claw, and a Sparring Gloves

Shadow Dash.description: Gain a Shen. Your strongest Shen becomes an Attack Fighter. His Ability is replaced with a dash that strikes low Health enemies. The number of dashes increases with each cast.

Arcanist Crown.description: Get an Arcanist Emblem, an Ahri, and a Jeweled Gauntlet.

Slayer Circlet.description: Gain a Slayer Emblem, a Zed, and a Sparring Gloves.

Artifact Expert: Titanic Hydra.description: Get a 2* Briar, a Titanic Hydra , and a B.F. Sword

Ionia Circlet.description: Get an Ionia Emblem, a Yunara, and a B.F. Sword.

Noxus Crown.description: Get an Noxus Emblem, a Sion, and a Protector's Vow.

Walk The True Path II.description: Gain @LesserDuplicatorAmount@ Lesser Champion Duplicators, a Yasuo, and a B.F. Sword. Reach level 10 and field 10 unique Ionians to unlock a Prismatic Upgrade.

Artifact Expert: Spectral Cutlass.description: Get a 2* Yasuo, a Spectral Cutlass, and a Sparring Gloves

Silco's Revenge.description: Zaunites explode into Shimmer on death, dealing @PercentMaxHealthDamage*100@% of their max Health to @EnemiesToDamage@ nearby enemies as magic damage. Gain a Blitzcrank, an Ekko, and a Vi.

The World Runes.description: Gain @NumEmblems@ Emblems from random Region traits. Gain @BaseXPPerRound@ XP every player combat, increased to @EnhancedXPPerRound@ XP if @MinRegionTraitsActive@ or more Region traits are active.

Artifact Expert: Talisman Of Ascension.description: Get a 2* Zac, a Talisman Of Ascension, and a Giant Belt

Longshot Crown.description: Get a Longshot Emblem, a Teemo, and a Guinsoo's Rageblade.

Void Crown.description: Get a Void Emblem, a Rek'Sai, and a Striker's Flail

Artifact Expert: Horizon Focus.description: Get a Cho'Gath, a Horizon Focus, and a Needlessly Large Rod

Hexgate Travel.description: When the Piltover invention triggers for the first time each combat, gain a random number of Piltover champions that cost between 1 and @MaxGold@ gold. Gain a Caitlyn and a Vi.

Artifact Expert: Sniper's Focus.description: Get a 2* Tristana , a Sniper's Focus, and a B.F. Sword

Leap of Faith.description: Gain an Illaoi. Your strongest Illaoi becomes a Fighter. Her Ability is replaced with an airborne slam that's recast when she kills her target.

Artifact Expert: Wits End.description: Get a 2* Viego, a Wits End, and a Needlessly Large Rod

Sentinels of Light.description: Gain a Lucian & Senna and a 2-star Vayne. Vayne fires additional bolts at enemies afflicted with Black Mist and on takedown, grants Attack Speed to Lucian & Senna.

Might.description: Your team gains @BaseTeamAD*100@% Attack Damage and @BaseTeamHealth@ Health. Gain an additional @TeamADPerDefeat*100@% Attack Damage and @TeamHealthPerDefeat@ Health per unique defeated or eliminated Tactician (@TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT16_Augment_TenetMight_DefeatedOpponents@/7).

Piltover Crown.description: Get a Piltover Crown, a Loris, and a Gargoyle Stoneplate.

Chosen Wolves.description: Gain an Ambessa and a Kindred. When Kindred casts, Ambessa always gains their protection against death and gains Attack Damage while protected. When Ambessa casts, Wolf strikes all enemies hit, dealing reduced damage.

Invoker Circlet.description: Get an InvokerEmblem, a Lissandra, and a Needlessly Large Rod.

Gunslinger Circlet.description: Get a Gunslinger Emblem, a Miss Fortune, and a Recurve Bow.

Artifact Expert: Lightshield Crest.description: Get a 2* Neeko, a Lightshield Crest, and a Chain Vest

Perfect Parry.description: Vanquishers have a chance to Parry equal to their Critical Strike Chance. When Parrying, they reduce their damage taken by @ParryDR*100@%. Gain a Rek'Sai.

The Axiomata.description: Gain @NumAugments@ random elemental hex augments. Future augment rounds instead grant you items and gold based on the augment's tier.

Shiv Expert: Twisted Fate.description: Get a Twisted Fate, a Statikk Shiv, and a Needlessly Large Rod.

Joint Album.description: Gain a Seraphine. Seraphine's heal is increased based on her ally's missing Health. Sona gains the Disruptor trait and fires an additional bolt with every cast. Gain a Sona after each player combat.

Lifting Competition.description:
At the start of each round, if the combined Health of all your unique Bruisers is high enough, gain a reward and increase the threshold (up to four times). Gain a Shen and a Sion.

@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT16_Augment_Weightlifting_RewardName@@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT16_Augment_Weightlifting_CurrentHealth@ / @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT16_Augment_Weightlifting_MaxHealth@

Timewinders.description:
Gain 2 Ekkos. Gain @XP@XP every combat Ekko participates in. Gain an Ekko every time you level up. At 3-Star, gain a Zilean.

Ekko's empowered attacks echo to all enemies being damaged by Zilean's spell, dealing @DamageShare*100@% of the original damage.

Secrets of the Sands.description: Gain @Gold@ gold. Gain an Azir on Stage @StageNum@-@RoundNum@. Each time you unlock a Shuriman, gain an ideal item for them.

Artifact Expert: Unending Despair.description: Get a 2* Rumble, a Unending Despair, and a Negatron Cloak

Noxus Circlet.description: Get an Noxus Emblem, an Ambessa, and a Sparring Glove.

Arcanist Circlet.description: Get an Arcanist Emblem, a Tear of the Goddess, and a Lux.

Quickstriker Circlet.description: Get a Quickstriker Emblem, a Yunara, and a B.F. Sword.

Bilgewater Circlet.description: Get a Bilgewater Emblem, a Miss Fortune, and a Recurve Bow.

Artifact Expert: Seeker's Armguard.description: Get a 2* Ekko, a Seeker's Armguard, and a Needlessly Large Rod

Lovers +.description: Gain a @MajorUnitCost@-cost and a @MinorUnitCost@-cost that share a trait.

Blood Pact ++.description: Gain @Gold@ gold. For each other player that picks this, lose @HealthLossPerPlayer@ Tactician Health.

Wealth Quest.description: When you reach @GoldRequired@ gold, gain a component anvil and @GoldReward@ gold.

Roll the Bones.description: Roll @Dice@ dice. Gain gold equal to the total.

Acceleration Hex.description:
Place the hex on a champion. Allies in the hex gain @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed.

[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

Hard Pivot.description: Sell your board and bench. Gain @FreeRerolls@ free rerolls, and your next @FiveCostShops@ shops have all 5 costs.

2-star 4-cost.description: Gain a random @StarLevel_TOOLTIPONLY@-star @ChampCost_TOOLTIPONLY@ cost champion. Lose @HealthLoss@ Tactician health.

Lesser Champion Duplicator.description:
Use on a 3-cost champion or less to create a 1-star copy on your bench.

[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

Starry Quest.description: The next time you star up a champion, gain @GoldReward@ gold.

Combat Hack.description: Your next augment selection will display all combat augments in the first slot, and that slot has @NumExtraRolls_TOOLTIPONLY@ extra rerolls.

2 Salvagers.description:
Use on a champion to remove all their items and break them down into components.

[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

2-star 3-cost.description: Gain a random @StarLevel_TOOLTIPONLY@-star @ChampCost_TOOLTIPONLY@ cost champion. Lose @HealthLoss@ Tactician health.

The Lovers.description: Gain a 5-cost champion and a 2* 2-cost champion that share traits.

Augment Wheel.description: Gain either: 1 random Prismatic augment, 2 random Gold augments, or 3 random Silver augments and @SilverGold@ gold.

Silver Augment.description: Open an armory of 3 Silver augments and choose one.

Starlight Hex.description:
Place the hex on a champion. Allies in the hex gain @ManaRegen@ Mana Regen.

[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

Boon of Omnipotence.description: When you reach level @LevelReq@, gain +1 to all non-unique traits.

Trade Sector.description: Gain a free Shop reroll every round. Gain @Gold@ gold.

5-cost shop.description: After @Delay@ rounds, get a free shop reroll and your next shop contains all 5-cost champions.

Anomaly.description:
Evolve the holder, granting an effect based on their role.

Tank: Gain @TankHP_TOOLTIPONLY@ health and grow in size.

Marksman: Gain @MarksmanBonusAS_TOOLTIPONLY*100@% Attack Speed. On cast, knock back their target if within @MarksmanKnockbackRange_TOOLTIPONLY@ hexes of them.

Fighter/Assassin: Gain @FighterAP_TOOLTIPONLY@ Ability Power & @FighterAD_TOOLTIPONLY@% Attack Damage. Triple it when below @FighterHealthThreshold_TOOLTIPONLY@% Health.

Caster: For every @CasterManaSpent_TOOLTIPONLY@ Mana spent, throw a @CasterHexRadius_TOOLTIPONLY@-hex fireball that deals @CasterHPRatio_TOOLTIPONLY*100@% max Health true damage, 33% Wounds, and 1% Burns for @CasterDuration_TOOLTIPONLY@ seconds.

Specialist: Gain @SpecialistNumStars_TOOLTIPONLY@ stars that orbit this champion. Each star deals @SpecialistMissileDamage_TOOLTIPONLY@ magic damage and the orbit expands to hit the champion's current target.

God Artifact Anvil.description: Drag this to the Shop to open an Armory full of God Artifact items! You will have 30 seconds to choose.

Blood Pact.description: Gain @Gold@ gold. For each other player that picks this, lose @HealthLossPerPlayer@ Tactician Health.

Low Health Quest.description: The first time you fall to @HP@ health, gain @GoldReward@ gold.

Shimmerscale Essence.description:
Gain a Mogul's Mail. In @combatnum@ rounds, gain a Gamblers Blade.

These items give gold as well as combat power.

Starter Kit.description:
Gain a 4-cost champion, a 2-star 1-cost champion that shares a trait with them, and @Gold@ gold.

At the start of the next @FutureChampionCount@ stages, gain that 4-cost champion again.

Sacrifice.description: Lose @HealthLoss@ Tactician health and gain @gold@ gold.

Augment Rerolls.description: You get +@ExtraRolls@ Augment rerolls for all future augment choices. Gain @Gold@ gold.

Steamroll.description: Gain a random @Tier@ cost now and after each player combat until you lose one.

Reroll Quest.description: After rolling the shop @RerollsNeeded@ times, gain @AnvilsToGrant@ component anvils.

2 Tiny Duplicators.description: Use on a 1-cost champion to create a 1-star copy of them.

Rainbow Shops.description: Your next @NumShops@ shops will each contain one unit of each tier. Gain @NumRerolls@ free reroll.

Better Together +.description: Gain @Health@ Tactician health. If at least 5 players choose this, gain @Gold@ gold.

Owned @Tier@ cost.description:
Gain a copy of a @Tier@-cost champion you own and @BonusGold@ gold.

If you don't own any @Tier@-cost champions, gain a random one

Storm Hex.description:
Place the hex on a champion. The first time an ally in the hex hits an enemy with an Ability, that enemy is Stunned for @StunDuration@ seconds.

[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

Better Together.description: Aura items that buff your team have their effects increased by @AuraIncreasePercent*100@%. Gain a Locket of the Iron Solari.

Level Quest.description: When you reach level @Level@, gain @GoldReward@ gold.

Level Up!.description: When you buy XP, gain an additional @XP@. Gain @InitialXP@ immediately.

Steamroll+.description: Gain a random @Tier@ cost now and after each player combat until you lose one.

Cosmic Hex.description:
Place the hex on a champion. Allies in the hex gain @PercentHealth*100@% max Health, and gain @BonusHealth@ permanent Health each round.

[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

Frontline Dummy.description: Gain a training dummy with a Brawler Emblem, a Bastion Emblem, and a Vanguard emblem.

Random Boon.description:
Gain a random boon from ANY god, and @Gold@ gold.

Chosen Boon: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_ThreshBoon_Stage4UnitProp1@
@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_ThreshBoon_Stage4UnitProp2@

Duplicator Deal.description: Gain 2 Lesser Champion Duplicators. You cannot use your shop for @ShopRoundLoss@ rounds.

Duplicator Bundle.description: Gain 5 Tiny Champion Duplicators and 1 Lesser Champion Duplicator.

Scuttle Party.description: Your next PVE round will be replaced with a Scuttle Crab round with bonus loot!

Cryogenic Hex.description:
Place the hex on a champion. The first time an ally in the hex falls below @HealthThreshold@% Health, they freeze for @BlockDuration@ second and heal @HealPercent*100@% of their max Health.

[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

Armored Dummy.description: Gain a training dummy with a Warmog's Armor, Bramble Vest, and Dragon's Claw.

Prismatic Augment.description: Open an armory of 3 Prismatic augments and choose one.

Trait Quest.description: After fielding @NumTraits@ non-unique traits in a player combat, gain a random Emblem and a Reforger.

Random Emblem.description: Gain a random Emblem. Lose @HealthLoss@ Tactician health.

Golden Hex.description:
Use on a champion to paint the hex below them, turning it into a Golden hex which empowers champions within. The empowered champion gains @BonusHealth_TOOLTIPONLY@ Health, @AttackSpeed_TOOLTIPONLY*100@% Attack Speed, and drops @Gold@ gold on kill.

[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

Treasure Armory.description: At the start of the next round, get an offering of loot you can reroll for 1 gold.

Lovers ++.description: Gain a @MajorUnitCost@-cost and a @MinorUnitCost@-cost that share a trait.

Gold Augment.description: Open an armory of 3 Gold augments and choose one.

Precise Smithing.description:
Reforging items and Artifacts grants an anvil of the same value instead. Gain @NumComponents@ component and @NumReforger@ reforger now, and @StageReforger@ reforgers every stage.

Includes components and Radiant Items, but does not affect Emblems or Tactician's Items.

@PercentIncrease@% Increased 5-Cost Odds.description: Permanently increase your shop odds for 5-costs by @PercentIncrease@%.

Solar Hex.description:
Place the hex on a champion. Allies in the hex deal @FireDamagePercent*100@% bonus magic damage over @Duration@ seconds. This damage 33% Wounds, and 1% Burns over the duration.

[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]
Burn: Deals a percent of the target's max Health as true damage every second
Wound: Reduces healing received

Divine Intervention.description: After falling to @HealthThreshold@ player health, gain a special loot orb.

Shared Wealth +.description: Gain @Gold@ gold. If at least @PlayersNeeded@ players choose this, gain an additional @BonusGold@ gold.

Blood Pact +.description: Gain @Gold@ gold. For each other player that picks this, lose @HealthLossPerPlayer@ Tactician Health.

2-star 2-cost.description: Gain a 2-star 2-cost champion. Lose @HealthLoss@ Tactician health.

Shared Wealth.description: Gain @Gold@ gold. If at least @PlayersNeeded@ players choose this, gain an additional @BonusGold@ gold.

3-star 1-cost.description: Gain a random @StarLevel_TOOLTIPONLY@-star @ChampCost_TOOLTIPONLY@ cost champion. Lose @HealthLoss@ Tactician health.

2 5-costs.description: Gain @NumChamps_TOOLTIPONLY@ random @StarLevel_TOOLTIPONLY@-star @ChampCost_TOOLTIPONLY@ cost champions. Lose @HealthLoss@ Tactician health.

@Tier@-Cost Shop.description: Your next shop contains all @Tier@-cost units. The first one you buy is free.

Malware Matrix.description:
Dealing physical damage to an enemy reduces the target's Armor by @ResistReduce@. (Ability Damage Cooldown: @Cooldown@ seconds)

Recommended users: Master Yi and Pyke.

Drone Uplink.description:
A drone repeats @DamageRepeat@% of damage from the holder's attacks and Abilities to the same targets every @Interval@ seconds.

Recommended users: Sona and Viktor.

Target-Lock Optics.description:
The holder's first attack on each enemy deals @AttackPct@ (%i:scaleAD%) additional damage.

At (4): If the holder is Psionic, they heal @HealPct*100@% of their max Health whenever their target dies.

Recommended users: Pyke and Master Yi

Semiconductor.description:
Every @AttacksToLaunch@ attacks and every @AttacksToReceive@ times being attacked, zap the @NumEnemies@ nearest enemies, dealing @PctHealthDamage*100@% of enemy Health as magic damage.

Recommended users: Gragas and Master Yi.

Biomatter Preserver.description:
Gain @PctMaxHP*100%@% max Health and deploy @NumGrenades@ Life Orbs. Every @Interval@ seconds of combat, one drops restoring @HealPct*100@% of the holder's missing Health.

Recommended user: Gragas.

Sympathetic Implant.description:
Every @Interval@ seconds, gain @ManaRegenOverTime@ additional Mana Per Second.

At (4): If the holder is Psionic, their abilities deal @TrueDamageConversion*100@% of their ability damage as true damage instead.

Recommended users: Sona and Viktor.

Zeke's Bleak Herald.description: When combat begins, the holder <TFTShadowItemPenalty>reduces the Attack Speed of all allies within @HexRange@ hexes in the same row by %i:scaleAS% @AttackSpeedReduction@%.</TFTShadowItemPenalty> <TFTShadowItemBonus>The holder then gains %i:scaleAS% @AttackSpeed@% Attack Speed for each affected ally.</TFTShadowItemBonus>

Hero 101.description: The first time you win @CombatWins@ player combats (Wins: @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT15_Augment_BattleAcademia_Hero101_Wins@), all Battle Academia champions gain @BonusHealth@ Health and @ReducedMana*100@% reduced max Mana. Gain a Garen and Ezreal.

Edgelord Crown.description: Gain an Edgelord Emblem, a Hand of Justice, and a Yasuo.

Prodigy Crown.description: Gain a Prodigy Emblem, a Spear of Shojin, and an Ezreal.

Supreme Cells Circlet.description: Gain a Supreme Cells Emblem and an Akali.

Space Camp.description: Whenever you upgrade a 1-cost Crew champion, gain a random 1-3 cost Crew champion. Gain a Malphite.

Nine Thousand Volts.description: Gain a Kennen. Your strongest Kennen becomes a ranged Marksman. He throws piercing Shurikens that can stun and deal magic damage.

Give 'em the Chair!.description: Gain a Dr. Mundo. Your strongest Dr. Mundo becomes a Ranged Marksman. He now throws chairs that deal heavy damage, but cost Health.

Diamond Hands.description: Once per combat: At @HPThreshold1*100@% Health, become invulnerable for @BaseDamageImmunityTime@ seconds and grant %i:goldCoins% @GoldPerImmunityProc@ gold.

Golden Guillotine.description: Executioner kills have a chance to drop loot, scaling with Critical Strike Chance. The value of the loot given can also critically strike, granting even more loot. Gain a Katarina and Kalista.

Mighty Mech Circlet.description: Gain a Mighty Mech Crest and a Lucian

Unbound Arcana.description: Every 2 seconds, Prodigies gain Ability Power equal to @PercentManaToAP*100@% of their Mana Regeneration (rounded down).

Class President.description: Combat start: Powered Up Battle Academia champions and allies adjacent to one gain @Health@ Health, @AD*100@% AD, and @AP@% AP. Battle Academia units gain double. Gain a Katarina

Ring The Bell.description: After @Timer@ seconds, your Heavyweight champions gain @MaxHealth*100@% max Health and @DamageAmp*100@% Damage Amp. Gain a Kobuko and a Zac.

Crystal Gambit Circlet.description: Gain a Crystal Gambit Emblem and a Janna.

Star Power.description: Star Guardians with a Power Up grant @PercentIncrease*100@% increased Star Guardian bonuses. Gain a Xayah.

Bastion Circlet.description: Gain a Bastion Emblem, a Sejuani, and a Giant's Belt.

Battle Academia Crown.description: Gain a Battle Academia Emblem, a Spirit Visage, and a Garen.

Strategist Circlet.description: Gain a Strategist Emblem, a Yuumi, and a Giant's Belt.

Tectonic Titan.description: Gain a Malphite. Your strongest Malphite becomes a Fighter, gaining increased Attack Speed. He now charges at nearby enemies, knocking them up and dealing heavy damage.

The Strongest Survive.description: Whenever an ally dies, they grant the Supreme Cell with the most damage this round @PercentHealth*100@% of their maximum health. Gain a Kai'Sa and Kennen.

Soul Fighter Crown.description: Gain a Soul Fighter Emblem, a Spear of Shojin, and a Kalista.

The God's Eye Opens.description: Every @Cadence@ seconds the God's Eye grants a random Soul Fighter @ShieldAmount@ shield and @AS*100@% stacking Attack Speed for the rest of combat. Gain a Kalista and Naafiri.

Raid Boss.description: Your strongest Bastion champion gains @Health*100@% max Health. When other Bastions die, they transfer @DefenseRatio*100@% of their Armor and Magic Resist to it. Gain a Shen and Rell.

Strategist Crown.description: Gain a Strategist Emblem, an Adaptive Helm, and an Ekko.

Learn From The Best.description: Whenever you star-up a champion they permanently gain @BonusPercent*100@% of every unique Mentor bonus of Mentors on your board or bench. Gain a Yasuo.

Executioner Crown.description: Gain an Executioner Emblem, a Guardbreaker, and a Graves.

I'll Be The Legs.description:
The Mighty Mech gains @BonusDefenses@ Armor and Magic Resist and @BonusHealth@ Health. Gain 3 Mighty Mech champions.

Field 7 Mighty Mech, reach level 10, and hold all 3 Mighty Mech Augments to activate MECHA-MERGE PROTOCOL.

Grand Slam.description: Luchadors gain @BonusAS*100@% Attack Speed. When Luchador is active, Luchadors leap into battle at combat start. Luchador leaps deal @PercentBaseAD*100@% of their Basic Attack Damage. Gain a Dr. Mundo.

Mighty Mech Crown.description: Gain a Mighty Mech Emblem, a Kraken's Fury, and a Lucian.

Battle Academia Circlet.description: Gain a Battle Academia Emblem and a Rakan.

Duelist Circlet.description: Gain a Duelist Emblem, an Ashe, and a BF Sword.

Power of Friendship.description: Star Guardians who start combat adjacent to at least one other Star Guardian gain @Mana@ Mana Regeneration, @Defenses@ Armor, and @Defenses@ Magic Resist. Gain a Rell.

Starfall.description: Gain a Neeko. Your strongest Neeko becomes a Magic Fighter and gains increased Attack Speed. Her Ability deals more damage, and increases its radius with every cast.

Heavyweight Circlet.description: Gain a Heavyweight Emblem, a Poppy, and a Giant's Belt.

Heavyweight Crown.description: Gain a Heavyweight Emblem, a Spirit Visage, and a Kobuko.

Escape Velocity.description:
Gain 1 Velocity per reroll, and @LevelNum@ when you level up. Crew units gain @AS*100%@% Attack Speed for every 3 Velocity.

(Velocity: @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT15_Augment_TheCrew_EscapeVelocity_Velocity@)

Gain The Edge.description: Edgelords now gain up to @Mult*100@% of their Attack Speed bonus the lower health their target is. Gain a Shen and Xayah.

New Contenders.description: Grant @BonusSharePercent*100@% of Supreme Cell's bonus to all champions on your team. Any champion on your team can now become the Supreme Cell. Gain a Kai'Sa and Kennen.

Burning Bright.description: Gain an Udyr. Your strongest Udyr becomes an Attack Fighter and sends bouncing gusts of flame out with every attack. His spell no longer rapidly attacks, but instead grants him stacking Attack Speed.

Unceasing.description: Whenever an ally Juggernaut dies, all other Juggernauts gain a @MaxHealthHeal*100@% max Health shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds and gain @AdditionalDurabilityRatio*100@% more Durability. Gain an Aatrox and Dr. Mundo.

The Darkness Within.description: The first @NumWraiths@ Wraith champions to die each combat summon a monstrosity from the Shadow Realm. Gain a Jhin and Zac.

Star Guardian Crown.description: Gain a Star Guardian Emblem, a Steadfast Heart, and a Rell.

I'll Be The Head.description:
The Mighty Mech gains @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed. Gain a Gangplank.

Field 7 Mighty Mech with a total of @TOOLTIPStarLevelReq@ Star Levels and reach level 10 to activate MECHA-MERGE PROTOCOL.

Power Upload.description:
You can give the Mighty Mech a Power Up. When it has Power Up the Mighty Mech gains @Health@ Health and @DamageAmp*100@% Damage Amp.

Gain an Aatrox, a Senna, and a Power Remover.

Preemptive Protection.description: Combat start: Protectors shield themselves and their closest ally for @ShieldPercentAmount*100@% of their maximum health. Shields stack. Gain a Rakan.

Perfect Form.description: Gain a Zac. Your strongest Zac becomes a Specialist. He now bounces around the battlefield dealing damage in a one hex radius.

Teacher's Council.description: Mentor bonuses are granted to your team regardless of how many Mentors you play. Gain a Kobuko.

Protector Circlet.description: Gain a Protector Emblem, a Neeko, and a Giant's Belt.

Game Plan.description: Mark 1 hex per Strategist fielded. Allies standing in marked hexes gain @FlatHealth@ Health and @BonusDamage*100@% Damage Amp, Strategists gain @PercentIncrease*100@% more. Gain a Janna and Ziggs.

Sniper Circlet.description: Gain a Sniper Emblem, a Jinx, and a Recurve Bow.

Tournament Titans.description:
Luchadors gain @BaselineAS*100@% Attack Speed. Whenever you win player combats, Luchadors grow in size and permanently gain @ADPerWin@% Attack Damage and @HealthPerWin@ Health. Gain a Dr Mundo and Gnar.

(Total: @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT15_Augment_Luchador_TournamentTitan_AD@% AD; @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT15_Augment_Luchador_TournamentTitan_Health@ Health)

Executioner Circlet.description: Gain an Executioner Emblem, a Vex, and a Sparring Gloves.

Bastion Crown.description: Gain a Bastion Emblem, a Steadfast Heart, and an Illaoi.

Supreme Cells Crown.description: Gain a Supreme Cells Emblem, a Last Whisper, and a Kai'sa.

Edgelord Circlet.description: Gain an Edgelord Emblem, a Samira, and a Recurve Bow.

Dazzling Display.description: Enemies who take damage from Sorcerer Abilities deal @DamageReduction*100%@% less damage for @Duration@ seconds. Gain a Lux and a Lucian.

Wraith Circlet.description: Gain a Wraith Emblem and a K'Sante.

Luchador Crown.description: Gain a Luchador Emblem, a Sterak's Gage, and a Dr Mundo.

Protector Crown.description: Gain a Protector Emblem, a Protector's Vow, and a Neeko.

Tiny Team.description: When you field @MaxStarGuardians@ or less Star Guardians, increase Star Guardian bonuses by an additional @BonusIncrease*100@%. Gain a Syndra and Rell.

Knuckledusters.description: Gain a Vi. Your strongest Vi becomes an Attack Fighter and has a chance to drop loot on kill. She now deals heavy single target damage and gains Attack Damage for item components equipped on your team.

Wraith Crown.description: Gain a Wraith Emblem, a Hextech Gunblade, and a Malzahar.

Deepening Shadows.description: At combat start and whenever the Shadow Realm strikes, Wraith champions gain @AD*100@% Attack Damage and @AP@% Ability Power. Gain a Jhin and Zac.

Star Guardian Circlet.description: Gain a Star Guardian Emblem and a Rell.

Soul Fighter Circlet.description: Gain a Soul Fighter Emblem and a Kalista.

Prodigy Circlet.description: Gain a Prodigy Emblem, a Malzahar, and a Needlessly Large Rod.

Tournament Favorites.description:
Soul Fighters gain Fame when they deal damage. Each Fame breakpoint grants loot. Gain a Naafiri and Kalista.

Fame: @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT15_Augment_SoulFighter_TournamentFavorites_Damage@/@TFTUnitProperty.:TFT15_Augment_SoulFighter_TournamentFavorites_Breakpoint@

Adaptive Style.description: On attack, Duelists gain @OffensiveStats*100@% Attack Damage and Ability Power, stacking up to @MaxStacks@ times. Duelist Tanks instead gain @DefensiveStats@ Armor and Magic Resist. Gain a Kai'Sa and Kayle.

Transfer Students.description: At the start of every stage and after every carousel round, gain @NumChamps@ random 1-3 cost Battle Academia champions. Gain an Ezreal.

Crystal Gambit Crown.description: Gain a Crystal Gambit Emblem, an Adaptive Helm, and a Janna.

Luchador Circlet.description: Gain a Luchador Emblem and a Dr Mundo.

Precise Shot.description: Every @Cadence@ seconds, all Sniper champions fire a shot that deals @BaseADPercent*100@% of their Basic Attack Damage to the lowest health enemy in range. Gain a Jhin.

Twilight Assault.description: Gain a Shen. Your strongest Shen becomes a ranged Marksman gaining +3 Range. His ability no longer shields but instead deals additional damage.

Schoolyard Justice.description: Gain a Garen. Your strongest Garen becomes a Fighter. He no longer Heals, but deals more damage and executes weak enemies.

Multi-Mech.description:
You no longer gain the Mighty Mech. Instead, all Mighty Mech champions gain @MechStatPercentage*100@% of the Health, Ability Power, and Attack Damage the Mech would have.

Gain an Aatrox.

I'll Be The Arms.description:
The Mighty Mech gains @BonusAS*100@% Attack Speed.

Field 7 Mighty Mech, reach level 10, and hold all 3 Mighty Mech Augments to activate MECHA-MERGE PROTOCOL.

Soul Surge.description: When they hit Max Power, Soul Fighters gain @AS*100@% Attack Speed and @Durability*100@% Durability for @Duration@ seconds.

Sorcerer Circlet.description: Gain an Sorcerer Emblem, a Karma, and a Tear of the Goddess.

Dynamo Circlet.description: Gain a Dynamo Emblem, a Miss Fortune, and a BF Sword.

Syndicate Circlet.description: Gain a Syndicate Emblem and a Braum.

Vanguard Circlet.description: Gain a Vanguard Emblem, a Leona, and a Giant's Belt.

Reinforcing Skeleture.description:
Whenever a Bruiser dies, it permanently gains @HealthBonus@ Health.
Gain a Darius and Alistar.

Divine Ascension.description: After @Delay@ seconds your Divinicorp champions ascend, gaining @BonusHealthPerc*100@% Health and @BonusAttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed. Gain a Rhaast and a Morgana.

Cypher Crown.description: Gain a Cypher Emblem, a Giant Slayer, and a LeBlanc.

Overclocked.description: Your A.M.P. champions with @ItemAmount@ items gain @AmpBonus@ Amp. Gain @Rerolls@ rerolls, a Naafiri, and a Nidalee.

Flatline.description: Marksmen execute enemies under @ExecutionPercent*100@% Health. Every time a Marksman executes, all Marksman gain @ASBonus*100@% Attack Speed. Gain a Jhin and a Kindred.

Speed Kills.description: Rapidfire champions start at @StartingStacks@ stacks and can go to @MaxStacks@. If you win combat within @CombatDuration@ seconds, gain @GoldReward@ gold. Gain a Twisted Fate and a Kog'Maw.

Divinicorp Crown.description: Gain a Divinicorp Emblem, a Spirit Visage, and a Rhaast.

Dynamo Crown.description: Gain a Dynamo Emblem, a Spear of Shojin, and an Elise.

Golden Fleece.description: Each Golden Ox drops @GoldDropped@ gold after fighting @TurnsPerGold@ rounds. Your max interest is @InterestCap@. Gain a Graves, an Alistar, and @Gold@ gold.

Rapidfire Circlet.description: Gain a Rapidfire Emblem, a Zeri, and a BF Sword.

Power Leveling.description:
Anima Squad takedowns have a @DropChance@% chance to drop an XP orb that sells for 1 XP. Anima Squad units gain @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed for each of your player levels. Gain a Seraphine and Illaoi.

@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Augment_AnimaSquad_Count_Tooltip@

The Chug Bug+.description: Gain @TOOLTIPNumberOfCopies@ Gragas. Your strongest Gragas's attacks have a chance to knockback and deal bonus magic damage. His ability heals and empowers his next attack.

Keep Your Friends Close.description: Syndicate Kingpins gain @BossAS*100@% Attack Speed and @BossHealth@ Health for each adjacent ally in their row. The allies gain @AllyHealth@ Health. Gain a Twisted Fate and a Darius.

Golden Ox Crown.description: Gain a Golden Ox Emblem, a Nashor's Tooth, and a Graves.

Dummy With A Gun.description: With Syndicate active, your Training Dummies shoot enemies. Every @NumAttacks@ times they attack, grant the Kingpins @ADAP@% Attack Damage and Ability Power. Gain @NumDummies@ Training Dummy, a Darius, and a Twisted Fate.

Divinicorp Circlet.description: Gain a Divinicorp Emblem and a Senna.

Cognitive Implant.description: Your Techies gain @InitialAbilityPower@ Ability Power, increased by @AbilityPower@ for every @NumTakedowns@ takedowns. Gain a Veigar and a Zyra.

Cease and Desist.description: Gain a Vi. Your strongest Vi gains Attack Speed and her ability dashes to the farthest target within 3-hexes, Stuns, and deals bonus physical damage.

Exotech Circlet.description: Gain an Exotech Emblem and a Mordekaiser.

Wolf Unchained.description: Gain a Sylas. Your strongest Sylas's ability deals more damage and recasts on kill, but his Health gain no longer scales with Ability Power.

Win More.description: Bet that you'll win 3 or more of the next 5 combats.

Capacitor.description: When Techies cast, grant the lowest Health Techie a Shield equal to @ManaConversion*100@% of the Mana spent. Gain a Veigar and a Zyra.

Support Spire.description:
After @TriggerDelay@ seconds in combat, a support spire grants Anima Squad a Shield, Attack Speed, or Stuns all enemies. Gain 3 Anima Squad champions.

@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Augment_AnimaSquad_SupportSpire_TRA@

Lifelong Learning.description: Your units gain @BaselineHP*100@% health every round. If they survive combat, they gain an additional @BonusAP@ Ability Power and @BonusAD*100@% Attack Damage.

Reactive Shell.description: Vanguards gain @BonusHealth*100@% Health. When the Vanguard Shield ends, deal @ExplosionDamage*100@% of the initial Shield as magic damage to their current target. Gain a Skarner and a Vi.

Expensive Taste.description:
Golden Ox gain @TraitAS*100%@% Attack Speed. Every @Rerolls@ shops contains a @Tier@-cost, reduced by each unique Golden Ox fielded in combat. Gain a Graves and an Alistar.

@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Augment_GoldenOx_ShopCount@

Polished Chrome.description: When you 3-star Nitro champions, they gain @BonusAD*100@% Attack Damage, @BonusAP@ Ability Power, and grant @Gold@ Gold. Gain a Kindred and a Nidalee.

Transference.description: When A.M.P. champions die, the nearest A.M.P. champion gains @AmpBonus@ Amp until the end of combat. Gain a Naafiri and a Nidalee.

Cutpurse.description:
Executioners have a @GoldDropChance*100@% chance to drop a gold when their attacks critically strike. Gain a Graves and Rengar.

Gold Gained: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Augment_CutpurseGold@

Hunter Killer Missile.description: Every @NumRockets@ Boombot rockets, fire an HK Missile at the current target that deals @DamageRatio*100@% of the original rocket's damage. Gain a Kog'Maw and a Skarner.

Street Demon Circlet.description: Gain a Street Demon Emblem and a Jinx.

Marksman Crown.description: Gain a Marksman Emblem, an Infinity Edge, and a Jhin.

BoomBot Crown.description: Gain a BoomBot Emblem, an Ionic Spark, and a Skarner.

Techie Crown.description: Gain a Techie Emblem, a Jeweled Gauntlet, and a Shyvana.

Alter Ego.description: Gain a Rhaast. Your strongest Rhaast enters Shadow Assassin form and his ability is replaced with a dash and 1 hex spin. If it kills, he immediately casts again.

Tagging Spree.description: Signature Street Demon hexes grant @BonusAS*100@% Attack Speed. Gain 3 Street Demons and @ItemCount@ Spray Can items that create signature Street Demon hexes.

Lethal Rerouting.description: Slayers above @HealthThreshold*100@% Health gain @AttackDamageBonus*100@% Attack Damage. While under @HealthThreshold*100@%, they gain @OmnivampBonus*100@% Omnivamp. Gain a Vayne and a Shaco.

Techie Circlet.description: Gain a Techie Emblem, a Brand, and a Tear of the Goddess.

Board of Directors.description: If you have @NumDivinicorp@ or fewer Divinicorp champions, their bonuses are increased by @BaseBonus*100@% + @BonusPerStage*100@% for each Stage. Gain a Rhaast and a Morgana.

Golden Fleece+.description: Each Golden Ox drops @GoldDropped@ gold after fighting @TurnsPerGold@ rounds. Your max interest is @InterestCap@. Gain a Graves, an Alistar, and @Gold@ gold.

Anima Squad Circlet.description: Gain an Anima Squad Emblem and a Yuumi.

10,000 IQ+.description:
Every @Rounds@ rounds with Strategist active, bet whether you'll win more or lose more. After those rounds, gain @GoldReward@ gold. If you're correct, gain a completed item Anvil. Gain a Yuumi and an Ekko.

@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Augment_Strategist_BetStatus@

Freestyling.description: Clear all painted hexes. When Street Demons start combat on a non-tagged hex, tag it. After all hexes are tagged, gain @GoldAmt@ gold. Gain 3 Street Demons.

Rapidfire Crown.description: Gain a Rapidfire Emblem, a Giant Slayer, and a Twisted Fate.

New High Score.description:
Cyberbosses increase their score when they deal damage. When they reach the next high score gain bonus loot. Gain a Veigar and a Poppy.

@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Augment_Cyberbosses_Highscore_Tooltip@

Cyberdeck.description: On combat start, @MaxNum@ of your Exotech units with @NumItems@ items gains their ideal Exotech item. Gain a Jax and Naafiri.

Golden Ox Circlet.description: Gain a Golden Ox Emblem and a Jarvan.

Trial Run.description: Gain an Exotech Golem with a copy of each of your Exotech items. Gain a Jhin and a Naafiri.

10,000 IQ.description:
Every @Rounds@ rounds with Strategist active, bet whether you'll win more or lose more. After those rounds, gain @GoldReward@ gold. If you're correct, gain a completed item Anvil. Gain a Yuumi and an Ekko.

@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Augment_Strategist_BetStatus@

Button Mash.description: Gain a Poppy. Your strongest Poppy's ability is replaced with a 3-hit Wallop.

Memory Bank.description:
Gain a Jhin and Morgana. Dynamos gain @DamageAmp*100@% Damage Amp. After they spend @ManaNeeded@ Mana, gain a Zhonya's Paradox and an Aurora.

@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Augment_Thirsty_ManaStored_Tooltip@

Transistor.description: When Bastions' start of combat bonus ends, @ConversionRate*100@% of it converts into Attack Damage and Ability Power and they gain @AttackSpeedBonus*100@% Attack Speed. Gain an Illaoi and Jax.

Expensive Taste+.description:
Golden Ox gain @TraitAS*100%@% Attack Speed. Every @Rerolls@ shops contains a @Tier@-cost, reduced by each unique Golden Ox fielded in combat. Gain a Graves and an Alistar.

@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Augment_GoldenOx_ShopCount@

Liquidate.description: When you trade Cypher Intel, your board and bench is sold for @ValueMultiplier*100@% value and you gain @ReforgerCount@ Reforgers. Gain a Draven.

Self-Destruct.description: Before dying, BoomBots jump on the nearest enemy and deal @BaseDamage@ physical damage + @RocketDamage*100@% dealt by rockets to adjacent enemies. Gain a Kog'Maw and a Skarner.

Adaptive Strikes.description: Gain a Jax. Your strongest Jax's attacks deal bonus magic damage every 3rd attack which gets stronger each time. His ability grants Attack Speed.

Street Demon Crown.description: Gain a Street Demon Emblem, a Guardbreaker, and an Ekko.

Cower, Weaklings!.description: Cyberboss abilities reduce the target's max Health by @HealthReduction*100@%. Cyberbosses take @DamageReduction*100@% less damage from enemies with less max Health. Gain a Poppy and a Veigar.

Syndicate Crown.description: Gain a Syndicate Emblem, an Infinity Edge, and a Darius.

Lose More.description: Bet that you'll lose 3 or more of the next 5 combats.

BoomBot Circlet.description: Gain a BoomBot Emblem and a Fiddlesticks.

The Chug Bug.description: Gain @TOOLTIPNumberOfCopies@ Gragas. Your strongest Gragas's attacks have a chance to knockback and deal bonus magic damage. His ability heals and empowers his next attack.

Exotech Crown.description: Gain an Exotech Emblem, a Guinsoo's Rageblade, and a Naafiri.

Spare Parts.description: Get a Nitro Hex Turret that has @SharePercent*100@% of your total Chrome. Gain a Shyvana.

Anima Squad Crown.description: Gain an Anima Squad Emblem, an Adaptive Helm, and an Illaoi.

Marksman Circlet.description: Gain a Marskman Emblem, an Aphelios, and a Recurve Bow.

Hostile Takeover.description: Cypher gains @CombatMultiplier*100@% of its combat bonus now. Gain @KillMultiplier*100@% Intel from kills, but only @LossMultiplier*100@% from losses. Gain a Draven.

Blue Battery III.description: Gain a Blue Buff. Your units gain @BonusAP@ Ability Power. After casting their Ability, gain @ManaRestore@ Mana.

Voltage Conduit.description: Reduce the max Mana of Piltover units by @ManaReduction*100@%.

Micro-Rockets.description: Fire a barrage of missiles that repeats @DamageRepeat*100@% of the damage dealt by Piltover units this combat as magic damage.

Kinetic Barrier.description: Piltover units gain @HigherResist@ Armor and @LowerResist@ Magic Resist. If they've taken more magic damage than physical, they gain the opposite.

Upgrade!.description: Upgrade a random item on your strongest Piltover unit to Radiant. They also gain @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed and @MaxHealth@ max Health.

Magnetron Coil.description: Piltover units gain @BaseDamageAmp*100@% Damage Amp, increased by @DamageAmpPerCast*100@% for each cast from any Piltover unit this combat before this Module triggered.

Gigantification Ray.description: Piltover units gain @MaxHealthGain*100@% max Health and become much larger.

Momentum Drive.description: Cleanse all allied crowd control effects. Your team gains @Tenacity*100@% Tenacity.

Blast Shield.description: All allies gain a @PercentHealthShield*100@% max Health Shield.

90 Caliber Nets.description: Stun the @NumEnemies@ enemies who have dealt the most damage for @Duration@ seconds.

Continuum Cogs.description: All allies gain @ManaGen@ Mana Regen and @AbilityPower@ Ability Power.

Tuned Oscillator.description: Increase your team's Healing and Shielding by @HealingShielding*100@%.

E.M.P..description: Increase the Mana cost of all enemies' next cast by @ManaCostIncrease@.

Electrical Overload.description: Deal @FlatDamage@ + @MaxHealthRatio*100@% max Health as true damage to all enemies.

Unstable Core.description: If Piltover units have cast at least @CastBreakpoint@ times this combat, deal @SuccessMaxHealthDamage*100@% max Health true damage to all enemies. Otherwise, deal @FailureMaxHealthDamage*100@%.

Armor Nullifier.description: Piltover units deal @BaseDamageAmp*100@% more damage, increased to @TankDamageAmp*100@% against Tanks.

Superior Lifeform.description: Summon a robot copy of your @NumUnitsToCopy@ strongest Piltover units. They have @PercentHealthOfOriginal*100@% of the original's Health and deal @DamageOutput*100@% as much damage.

Mining Drill.description: Gain @RollsPerCastBreakpoint@ Gold or @RollsPerCastBreakpoint@ Boot, randomly. (Repeats for every Piltover cast!)

Echo Engine.description: For the rest of combat, repeat the effects of your other Modules every @RepeatSeconds@ seconds.

Acceleration Gate.description: After casting, Piltover units restore @ManaRefill*100@% of their max Mana over @RefillDuration@ seconds.

Dead Man's Dagger.description:
Attacks and Abilities execute enemies below @ExecuteThreshold*100@% Health. On kill, gain @BonusADPerKill*100@% Attack Damage and @BonusAPPerKill@% Ability Power.

Recommended holder: Graves

Lucky Doubloon.description:
On takedown, generate an additional @BonusSerpents@ %i:scaleSerpents%. (Earned: @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_LuckyDoubloon_SerpentsEarned@)

Recommended holder: Gangplank

Cutthroat's Cutlass.description:
Damaging enemies causes them to Bleed, dealing an additional @BleedDamagePercent*100@% damage over 4 seconds.

Recommended holder: Gangplank

Blackmarket Explosives.description:
Every @Interval@ seconds, deal @BaseDamage@ + @DamageStored*100@% of damage dealt within the last @Interval@ seconds as magic damage to current target and @NumTargets@ nearest enemies.

Recommended holder: Fizz

+@BonusArmorMR@ Armor & Magic Resist.description: Bilgewater champions gain @BonusArmorMR@ Armor and @BonusArmorMR@ Magic Resist.

+@BonusAD*100@% Attack Damage & Ability.description: Bilgewater champions gain @BonusAD*100@% Attack Damage and @BonusAP@% Ability Power.

+@BonusAD*100@% Attack Damage.description: Bilgewater champions gain @BonusAD*100@% Attack Damage and Ability Power.

Black Market Restock.description: Replace all items in the Black Market!

Brigand's Dice.description: Immediately re-roll your shop and fill it with Bilgeater champions.

Pile O' Citrus.description:
Every @HealthRegenInterval@ seconds, heal @HealingPercent@% max Health and shed all negative effects. After @SerpentTimer@ seconds, gain @BonusSerpents@ %i:scaleSerpents%.

Recommended holder: Illaoi

First Mate's Flintlock.description:
Every second during combat, gain @ADPerStack*100@% Attack Damage and @ASPerStack*100@% Attack Speed.

Recommended holder: Miss Fortune

Treasure Typhoon.description: Summon a tidal wave that brings valuable treasures from the deep.

Haunted Spyglass.description:
NYI
Once per fight, after 3 takedowns, summon the ghost of the Dreadway, dealing 650% (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage in a 3-hex radius.

Barknuckles.description:
While above @HealthThreshold*100@% Health, double the Armor and Magic Resist bonuses from this item.

Every @Timer@ seconds, deal magic damage equal to @ResistPercent*100@% of current total Armor and Magic Resist to the @NumEnemies@ nearest enemies.

Recommended holder: Nautilus

Captain's Hat.description: <danger>NYI</danger> The bearer becomes the Captain! Grant allies (a really cool effect) while the bearer is alive.

Dreadway Cannon.description:
NYI
Every 4 seconds, launch cannonballs at the bearer's target, dealing damage equal to 50% of the damage they took over the last 4 seconds.

Captain's Brew.description:
Attacks and Abilities Burn and Chill enemies for @DebuffDuration@ seconds.

Recommended holder: Twisted Fate

Bilgewater Lesser Champion Duplicator.description: Use on a 3-cost Bilgewater champion or less to create a 1-star copy on your bench.

Syren's Broadside.description: At combat start, call in a cannon barrage dealing massive damage to all enemies.

Gwen's Scissors.description:
Use on a champion to remove all their items and break them down into components.

[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

Aim-Assistant.description: Deal @BonusDamagePerHex*100@% bonus damage per hex distance from the target.

Reinforced Frame.description:
!!DO NOT PICK - NOT YET IMPLEMENTED!!
1 Range, Attack Tank
Specialized in absorbing damage and protecting allies.

Meltthrough.description: Every second, reduce the Armor of enemies within 2-hexes by @ArmorMRReduction@, doubled for adjacent enemies.

Buckshot++.description: Increase the number of Attack projectiles by @NumBonusProjectiles@. Spread increased by @SpreadIncrease*100@%.

!!DO NOT PICK - NOT YET IMPLEMENTED!!
4 Range, Hybrid Caster
Specialized in debilitating enemies and empowering allies.

Tankbuster.description: Tankbuster: Every @Tankbuster_RefreshDuration@ seconds, deal @Tankbuster_APDamage_Level1@% / @Tankbuster_APDamage_Level2@% / @Tankbuster_APDamage_Level3@% %i:scaleAP% as true damage to the enemy with the most Armor and Magic Resist.

Fragmentation Rounds+.description: Attacks send @FragmentProjectiles@ fragments to nearby enemies on hit that deal @FragmentDamage*100@% damage.

Reactive Armor.description: Taking damage from enemies grants @ReactiveArmorAndMR@ bonus Armor and Magic Resistances, up to @MaxReactiveArmorAndMR@.

Shockwave.description: Combat Start: Unleash a shockwave forward that deals @ShockwavePercentMaxHealthDamage*100@% of Graves' max Health as magic damage and stun enemies hit for @ShockwaveStunDuration@ seconds.

Buckshot.description: Increase the number of Attack projectiles by @NumBonusProjectiles@. Spread increased by @SpreadIncrease*100@%.

Emergency Shielding.description: At @TriggerHealth*100@% Health, gain a @PercentMaxHealthShield*100@% max Health shield that decays over @Duration@ seconds.

Rev-Up+.description: Gain @AttackSpeedPerAttack*100@% Attack Speed for each attack against the same target, up to @MaxAttackSpeed*100@%.

Emergency Shielding+.description: At @TriggerHealth*100@% Health, gain a @PercentMaxHealthShield*100@% max Health shield that decays over @Duration@ seconds.

Ripper Bullets.description: Attacks reduce enemy Armor and Magic Resistance by @ArmorMRReduction@.

Ripper Bullets+.description: Attacks reduce enemy Armor and Magic Resistance by @ArmorMRReduction@.

AP Rounds.description: Attacks and Abilities ignore @ArmorPen*100@% of enemy Armor

Rev-Up.description: Gain @AttackSpeedPerAttack*100@% Attack Speed for each attack against the same target, up to @MaxAttackSpeed*100@%.

Heavy Plating.description: Gain @BaseHealth@ Base Health, @BonusAR@ Armor, and @BonusMR@ Magic Resistance.

Grav Booster+.description: On takedown, dash to the next target and attack @BonusMultAS*100@% faster for @NumAttacks@ attacks.

Latent Explosion.description: Store @LatentExplosionStoredDamage*100@% of damage dealt to enemies. On takedown, enemies release the stored damage as physical damage in a two-hex radius.

Power Frame.description:
Gain Precision and increase Ability damage by @AbilityDamagePercentIncrease*100@%.

{{TFT_Keyword_Precision}}

Laser Ballistics.description: Attacks travel an additional hex and pierce enemies, reducing damage by @DamageReductionPerTarget*100@% per target pierced.

LaserBallistics++.description: Attacks travel an additional @BonusHexes@ hexes and pierce enemies, reducing damage by @DamageReductionPerTarget*100@% per target pierced.

Laser Ballistics+.description: Attacks travel an additional @BonusHexes@ hexes and pierce enemies, reducing damage by @DamageReductionPerTarget*100@% per target pierced.

Blast Radius++.description: Secondary blast radius is increased by @IncreasedRadius@ hexes, dealing @DamageReductionPerHex*100@% less for each additional hex.

Sympathetic Detonation.description: A second one-hex radius explosion occurs on the nearest enemy, dealing @SympatheticDamageReduction*100@% damage.

AP Rounds+.description: Attacks and Abilities ignore @ArmorPen*100@% of enemy Armor

Elite Vanguard.description: Your champions holding an item gain @AttackSpeed*100@ Attack Speed.

Tons of Stats!.description: Your team gains @Health@ Health, @AttackDamage@% Attack Damage, @AbilityPower@% Ability Power, @Armor@ Armor, @MR@ Magic Resist, @AttackSpeed@% Attack Speed, and @Mana@ Mana.

Bulwark.description: Combat start: Your champions in the front 2 rows gain @Health@ Health.

Swift Strike.description: Combat start: Your champions in the back 2 rows gain @AS*100@ Attack Speed.

Unhindered.description: Your champions without items gain @AttackSpeed*100@ Attack Speed.

Cybernetic Mass.description: Your champions holding an item gain @Health@ Health.

Splash Zone.description: Combat start: Your champions in the front 2 rows gain @Mana@ Mana.

Edgelord Emblem.description:
The holder gains the Edgelord trait.
Dealing physical damage to an enemy reduces their Armor by @ArmorPerDamage@.

Sorcerer Emblem.description: The holder gains the Sorcerer trait.

Bastion Emblem.description: The holder gains the Bastion trait. After the first @Delay@ seconds of combat, the holder gains @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed.

Prodigy Emblem.description:
The holder gains the Prodigy trait.
On cast, shield the lowest percent Health ally for @ManaConversion*100@% of mana spent.

Battle Academia Emblem.description: The holder gains the Battle Academia trait, and @HealthPerPotential@ Health and @DAPerPotential*100@% Damage Amp per %i:set14AmpIcon%.

Heavyweight Emblem.description: The holder gains the Heavyweight trait, and gains @HealthPerTakedown@ max Health on takedown.

Juggernaut Emblem.description: The holder gains the Juggernaut trait and @PercentHealth*100@% of other Juggernaut's max Health when they die.

Protector Emblem.description: The holder gains the Protector trait.

Crystal Gambit Emblem.description: The holder gains the Crystal Gambit trait.

Duelist Emblem.description:
The holder gains the Duelist trait.

[Unique - Only One Per Champion]

Executioner Emblem.description:
The holder gains the Executioner trait.
Critical Strikes ignore @ResistIgnore*100@% of the target's Armor and Magic Resist.

Soul Fighter Emblem.description: The holder gains the Soul Fighter trait.

Supreme Cells Emblem.description: The holder gains the Supreme Cells trait.

Wraith Emblem.description: The holder gains the Wraith trait.

Strategist Emblem.description: The holder gains the Strategist trait and @SecondaryEffectiveness*100@% of the other Strategist bonus.

Sniper Emblem.description: The holder gains the Sniper trait and +@HexRangeIncrease@ Attack Range.

Luchador Emblem.description: The holder gains the Luchador trait.

Star Guardian Emblem.description: The holder gains the Star Guardian trait.

Lioness's Lament.description:
Every @HealthPerMissile*100@% max health lost, fire crescent projectiles in a line dealing physical damage equal to @ResistPercent*100@% of the holder's Armor and Magic Resist. Steal @ResistSteal@ Armor and Magic Resist from all enemies hit.

Recommended Roles: Attack or Magic Tank

Savage Slicer.description:
Attacks hit the target and all adjacent enemies for @SplashDamage*100@% of Basic Attack Damage. Omnivamp applies @OmnivampEffectiveness*100@% to this damage.

Briar Bonus: If this item is equipped on Briar, on cast this effect happens @BriarHitsOnCast@ times.

UwU Blaster.description:
Every attack, fire @NumUwUBlasts@ laser blasts random targets in range, dealing @ADDamage*100@% of the holder's Attack Damage as physical damage.

Recommended Role: Attack Marksman

Searing Shortbow.description: Every @CastPeriod@ seconds, a random Anima Squad champion fires Searing Shortbow, shooting an arrow that leaves an area that deals magic damage over time.

Deep Freeze.description:
The first time you fall below @HealthThreshold1*100@%, @HealthThreshold2*100@%, @HealthThreshold3*100@%, and @HealthThreshold4*100@% health, gain a @ShieldPercent*100@% max health shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds. When this happens, release a frost nova that stuns enemies within @HexRange@ hexes for @StunDuration@ seconds and deals magic damage equal to @MaxHealthDamage*100@% of their max Health.

The radius increases by @HexRangeIncreasePerProc@ each nova.

Recommended Roles: Attack or Magic Tank

Animapocalypse.description:
Store @DamageStore*100@% of damage dealt. Every @Delay@ seconds and on death, deal the stored damage as true damage to all enemies, reduced by @HexFalloff*100@% for each hex they are from the epicenter.

Recommended Roles: Attack or Magic Caster

Guiding Hex.description: Every @CastPeriod@ seconds, a random Anima Squad champion casts Guiding Hex, dealing magic damage to 3 random nearby targets.

Solar Eclipse.description:
Gain @HealthPercent*100@% max Health. Every second, deal magic damage in a @HexRadiusBase@ hex radius equal to @HealthRatio*100@% of the holder's max Health, and gain max Health equal to @DamageToHealthConversion*100@% of damage dealt. Radius increases every @Period@ seconds.

Recommended Roles: Attack or Magic Tank

Radiant Field.description:
Gain @HealthPercent*100@% max health. Every second, deal magic damage in a @HexRadiusBase@-hex radius equal to @HealthRatio*100@% of the holder's max Health. Radius increases every @Period@ seconds.

Recommended Roles: Attack or Magic Tank

Rocket Swarm.description:
Every @ManaThreshold@ Mana spent, fire a barrage of @NumRockets@ rockets at the target, each dealing @RocketDamagePercent*100@% %i:TFTBaseAD% physical damage.

Jinx Bonus: If this item is equipped on Jinx, instead replace all ability bullets with rockets that deal @JinxPercentIncrease*100@% increased damage.

Echoing Batblades.description:
Every @NumAttacks@ attacks, fire @NumArrows@ batblades split between the 3 nearest enemies. Each blade deals @ArrowDamagePercent*100@% %i:TFTBaseAD% physical damage.

Recommended Role: Attack Marksman

Vayne's Chromablades.description:
Every @NumAttacks@ attacks, fire @NumArrows@ chromablades split between all enemies. Each blade deals @ArrowDamagePercent*100@% %i:TFTBaseAD% physical damage.

Recommended Role: Attack Marksman

Battle Bunny Crossbow.description:
Gain Precision.

Every @NumCritsNeeded@ critical strikes, fire @NumArrows@ piercing arrows that can critically strike towards the target. Each deals @ArrowDamagePercent*100@% %i:TFTBaseAD% physical damage.

{{TFT_Keyword_Precision}}
Max @MaxPerSpell@ stacks per Ability cast.
Recommended Roles: Attack Marksman or Fighter

Iceblast Armor.description:
The first time you fall below @HealthThreshold1*100@% and @HealthThreshold2*100@% health, gain a @ShieldPercent*100@% max health shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds and release a frost nova that stuns enemies within @HexRange@ hexes for @StunDuration@ seconds.

Recommended Roles: Attack or Magic Tank

Broken Prototype.description: Combat start: Gain a @Shield*100@% max Health shield.

Leaky Prototype.description: Every @Interval@ seconds, this item loses @APLoss@ Ability Power and gains @ManaRegenPerLoss@ Mana Regen.

Bunny Prime Ballista.description:
Gain Precision.

Every @NumCritsNeeded@ critical strikes, fire @NumArrows@ piercing arrows that can critically strike towards the target. Each deals @ArrowDamagePercent*100@% %i:TFTBaseAD% physical damage.

On takedown, fire a burst of @ArrowsOnTakedown@ arrows from the target.

{{TFT_Keyword_Precision}}
Max @MaxPerSpell@ stacks per Ability cast.
Recommended Roles: Attack Marksman or Fighter

Sparking Prototype.description: Every @Interval@ seconds, gain @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed for @Duration@ seconds.

Unceasing Cyclone.description:
Gain 6 orbiting razors. Razors deal @Damage@ true damage, and 30% Shred and Sunder enemies for the rest of combat. Deal @DamageIncrease*100@% increased damage to Shredded or Sundered enemies.

Damage increases based on Stage.
Recommended Roles: Attack or Magic Fighter

Tentacle Slam.description:
Every @Frequency@ seconds, summon a tentacle that slams down on the target, dealing @SlamDamage@ physical damage and healing the holder for @Heal*100@% max health.

Illaoi Bonus: If this item is equipped on Illaoi, an additional tentacle slams targets drained by her ability at @IllaoiEffectiveness*100@% effectiveness.

Damage increases based on Stage.

The Annihilator.description: At @DelayTime@ seconds, The Annihilator deals percent max Health true damage once.

Cyclonic Slicers.description:
Gain 3 orbiting razors. Razors deal @Damage@ magic damage, and 30% Shred and Sunder enemies for @ShredDuration@ seconds. Deal @DamageIncrease*100@% increased damage to Shredded or Sundered enemies.

Damage increases based on Stage.
Recommended Roles: Attack or Magic Fighter

Evolved Embershot.description:
For every @ManaPerProjectile@ mana spent, fire a projectile at a nearby enemy dealing @ProjectileDamage@ + @APScalar*100@% of the holder's Ability Power magic damage, and applying @BurnPercent@% Burn and @GrievousWoundsPercent@% Wound to enemies for @BurnDuration@ seconds.

Each projectile leaves a lingering field that deals @FieldDamagePerSecond@ magic damage to enemies each second.

Damage increases based on Stage.
Burn: Deals a percent of the target's max Health as true damage every second
Wound: Reduces healing received
Recommended Roles: Magic Caster

OwO Blaster.description:
Every attack, fire @NumUwUBlasts@ laser blasts random targets in range, dealing @ADDamage*100@% of the holder's Attack Damage as physical damage.

Recommended Roles: Attack Marksman

Every @HealthPerMissile*100@% max health lost, fire crescent projectiles in @PrismaticNumTargets@ lines dealing physical damage equal to @ResistPercent*100@% of the holder's Armor and Magic Resist. Steal @ResistSteal@ Armor and Magic Resist from all enemies hit.

Recommended Roles: Attack or Magic Tank

Guinsoo's Rageblade.description: Gain @AttackSpeedPerStack@% stacking Attack Speed every second.

Zeke's Herald.description:
Combat start: Grant %i:scaleAS% @AttackSpeed@% Attack Speed to the holder and allies within 2 hexes in the same row.

​​[Support item]

Hand Of Justice.description:
Gain 2 effects:
  • @AD_NotStatBar*100@% Attack Damage and @AP_NotStatBar@% Ability Power.
  • @StatOmnivamp_NotStatBar*100@% Omnivamp.

    While above @HealthThreshold*100@% health, double the Attack Damage and Ability Power. While below @HealthThreshold*100@% Health, double the Omnivamp.

Giant Slayer.description: Gain @DamageAmp*100@% additional Damage Amp against Tanks.

Locket of the Iron Solari.description:
Combat start: The holder and allies within @HexRange@ hexes in the same row gain a @ShieldValue@ Shield, @BonusResists@ Armor, and @BonusResists@ Magic Resist for @ShieldDuration@ seconds.

​​[Support item]

Spirit Visage.description: Regenerate @MissingHealthHeal*100@% of missing Health each second.

Gain @BonusPercentHP*100@% max Health.

Every @ICD@ seconds, deal @BurnPercent@% Burn and @GrievousWoundsPercent@% Wound to an enemy within @HexRange@ hexes for @BurnDuration@ seconds.

Burn: Deals a percent of the target's max Health as true damage every second
Wound: Reduces healing received

Gain @BaseDurability*100@% Durability. While above @ThresholdForEmpower*100@% Health, instead gain @EmpoweredDurability*100@% Durability.
