Pulse Silencer.description:
Execute enemies below @ExecuteThresholdPercent*100@% Health. Abilities can critically strike. Gain @RedundantCritDamage*100@% Critical Strike Damage.

Total Executions This Round: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Trait_Cybernetic_JhinItem_TotalExecutions@

Recommended users: Jhin and Zeri

Corrupted Chassis.description:
All Shields are @ShieldEffectivenessPercent*100@% more effective on the holder. Every @SiphonFrequency@ seconds, siphon @HealthSiphonAmt*100@% of the owner's max Health from the current target and convert it to a Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds.

Shielding This Round: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Trait_Cybernetic_MordekaiserItem_TotalShielding@

Recommended users: Mordekaiser, Jax, and Sejuani

Holobow.description:
Attacks that Critically Strike grant @BonusManaOnHit@ bonus Mana. After casting an Ability, gain @CritChanceOnCast@% Critical Strike Chance for @Duration@ seconds.

Recommended users: Varus, Jhin, and Zeri

Cybercoil.description:
Abilities and Attacks mark enemies for @MarkDuration@ seconds. Heal for @HealingPercent*100@% of damage dealt to marked enemies.

Total Healing This Round: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Trait_Cybernetic_SejuaniItem_TotalHealing@

Recommended users: Sejuani, Jax, and Mordekaiser

Scoped Holobow.description:
Attacks that Critically Strike grant @BonusManaOnHit@ bonus Mana. After casting an Ability, gain @CritChanceOnCast@% Critical Strike Chance for @Duration@ seconds.

Recommended users: Varus, Jhin, and Zeri

Apex-Fangs.description:
When you damage an enemy, deal @StoredDamage*100@% of the damage to the nearest enemy as physical damage after a brief delay.

Total Shockwave Damage This Round: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Trait_Cybernetic_NaafiriItem_TotalShockwaveDamage@

Recommended users: Naafiri, Jhin, and Varus

Pulse Stabilizer.description:
Execute enemies below @ExecuteThresholdPercent*100@% Health. Abilities can critically strike. If the holder's abilities can already critically strike, gain @RedundantCritDamage*100@% Critical Strike Damage instead.

Total Executions This Round: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Trait_Cybernetic_JhinItem_TotalExecutions@

Recommended users: Jhin and Zeri

Flux Capacitor.description:
Attacks store charge. At @ChargeCap@ charges, the next attack consumes the charges to deal @ShockDamage*100@% of the target's max health as physical damage and reduces their Armor by @FlatArmorReduction@.

Total Charge Damage This Round: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Trait_Cybernetic_ZeriItem_TotalLightningDamage@

Recommended users: Zeri and Naafiri

Repulsor Lantern.description:
Gain @BonusPercentHP*100@% health. Every @Interval@ seconds, deal @PercHealthDamage*100@% of the holder's max health as magic damage to all enemies within @Radius@-hex.

Total Damage Dealt This Round: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Trait_Cybernetic_JaxItem_TotalDamageReflected@

Recommended users: Jax, Mordekaiser, and Sejuani

Hijacked Cybercoil.description:
Abilities and Attacks mark enemies for @MarkDuration@ seconds. Heal for @HealingPercent*100@% of damage dealt to marked enemies.

Total Healing This Round: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Trait_Cybernetic_SejuaniItem_TotalHealing@

Recommended users: Sejuani, Jax, and Mordekaiser

Fully-Charged Flux Capacitor.description:
Every other attack is charged, dealing @ShockDamage*100@% of the target's max health as physical damage and reduces their Armor by @FlatArmorReduction@.

Total Charge Damage This Round: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Trait_Cybernetic_ZeriItem_TotalLightningDamage@

Recommended users: Zeri and Naafiri

Nullifier Lantern.description:
Gain @BonusPercentHP*100@% health. Every @Interval@ seconds, deal @PercHealthDamage*100@% of the holder's max health as magic damage to all enemies within @Radius@-hex.

Total Damage Dealt This Round: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Trait_Cybernetic_JaxItem_TotalDamageReflected@

Recommended users: Jax, Mordekaiser, and Sejuani

Harmonized Chassis.description:
All Shields are @ShieldEffectivenessPercent*100@% more effective on the holder. Every second, siphon @HealthSiphonAmt*100@% of the owner's max Health from the nearest @NumEnemies@ enemies and convert it to a Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds.

Shielding This Round: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Trait_Cybernetic_MordekaiserItem_TotalShielding@

Recommended users: Mordekaiser, Jax, and Sejuani

Hyper Fangs.description:
When you damage an enemy, store @StoredDamage*100@% of your damage dealt to them. After @MarkDuration@ seconds, deal the stored damage to the target and the nearest enemy as physical damage.

Total Shockwave Damage This Round: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Trait_Cybernetic_NaafiriItem_TotalShockwaveDamage@

Recommended users: Naafiri, Jhin, and Varus

Arcana Signifier.description:
Use this on an Arcana champion to change Arcana's effect to theirs.

Ahri: Gain Ability Power for each 3-star champion.
Hecarim: Units holding items gain Damage Reduction and Attack Damage.
Tahm Kench: Gain Health for each active trait.
Xerath: Abilities deal bonus true damage for each Charm purchased.
Emblem: Gain Damage Amp for each Spatula item equipped.

Eternal Monarch's Crown.description:
After dealing damage @MaxNumStacks@ times, gain @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT12_Faerie_DamageAmp@% %i:scaleDA% for the rest of combat.

After dealing damage @RadiantMaxStacks@ times, gain @RadiantMaxHealth*100@% maximum Health, @RadiantOmnivamp*100@% Omnivamp, and @RadiantDamageAmp*100@% damage amp.

Only Faeries can hold this item.
Bench the champion to remove it.

Faerie Queen's Crown.description:
After dealing damage @MaxNumStacks@ times, gain @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT12_Faerie_DamageAmp@% %i:scaleDA% for the rest of combat.

Only Faeries can hold this item.
Bench the champion to remove it.

Cursed Quicksilver.description: The holder of this item is stunned. This effect ends when they die.

A Light Snack.description:
Use this on a Briar to grant her @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT12_BoundHealthGain@ %i:scaleHealth% in exchange for @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT12_BoundHealthCost@ of your player health.

In Choncc's Treasure, this item is improved at Stage 3-1 and 4-1.

[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

Cursed Guinsoo's Rageblade.description: The holder of this item sets their attack speed cap to @ASCap@ and cannot gain mana or cast. Every time they are attacked, the attacker gains <TFTBonus>@BonusAttackSpeed*100@%</TFTBonus> Attack Speed.

Cursed Hextech Gunblade.description: The holder deals @NegativeDamageAmp*100@% less damage. They also take @DamageRatio*100@% of their max health as true damage per second, and heal Milio for the same amount.

Queenguard's Armor.description:
Gain @HealShieldPower*100@% increased healing and shielding. Heal for @QueenHealRatio*100@% of the Queen's damage dealt.

Only Faeries can hold this item.
Bench the champion to remove it.

Armor of Eternal Devotion.description:
Gain @HealShieldPower*100@% increased healing and shielding. Heal for @QueenHealRatio*100@% of the Queen's damage dealt.

Only Faeries can hold this item.
Bench the champion to remove it.

Flame Affinity.description:
Wounded allies gain @WoundDamageAmp*100@% %i:scaleDA%.

Wound: Reduce healing received by 50%

Dormant Prophecy.description: Combat Start: If the holder is 3 star, they star up.

Fire Storm.description:
Combat Start: Wound all enemies for @Duration@ seconds.

Wound: Reduce healing received by 50%

Limit Break.description: Gain @AbilityPower@ Ability Power & @AttackDamage@% Attack Damage. Triple it when below @HealthThreshold@% Health.

Shatter Sweep.description:
Allies that start combat in the back @NumRow@ rows @ArmorReduction*100@% Sunder enemies for @Duration@ seconds when dealing physical damage.

Sunder: Reduce Armor

Unyielding Covenant.description: This champion is <TFTKeyword>Untargetable</TFTKeyword> while at least @NumAlliesAlive@ allies are alive (does not include the holder).

Arcane Rend.description:
Allies that start combat in the back @NumRow@ rows @MRReduction*100@% Shred enemies for @Duration@ seconds when dealing magic damage.

Shred: Reduce Magic Resist

Use your Power Snax on a champion to unl.description: Use your Power Snax on a champion to unlock Power Ups.

Fusion Hex.description: <spellPassive>Combat Start:</spellPassive> Merge with the nearest ally gaining @StatPercent*100@% of their Health, Attack Damage, Ability Power.

Shield Melt.description: Combat Start: Your team deals @BonusDamage@% bonus damage to shielded enemies.

Cold Affinity.description:
Combat Start: Chill all enemies in the back 2 rows

Chill: Reduce healing received by 20%

Training Weights.description:
This champion receives a penalty for @NumRounds@ rounds losing -@DamagePenalty*100@% %i:scaleDA% and -@DurabilityPenalty*100@% %i:scaleDR% and capping their Attack Speed to @ASCapPenality@.

After @NumRounds@ rounds, remove the penalty and instead gain @ASReward*100@% %i:scaleAS% and @DamageReward*100@% %i:scaleDA%.

Rounds are tracked per Champion.

Ki Barrier.description: The holder takes @FlatReducedDamage@ less damage from all sources.

Mascot.description:
Your team heals a percentage of their max Health every @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mascot.1:Seconds@ seconds.

When a champion dies, they retreat to the sidelines to cheer on your team. Your team's healing increases for each cheering champion.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mascot.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mascot.1:BaseHealthRegen@% %i:scaleHealth% base, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mascot.1:HealthRegenPerMascot@% %i:scaleHealth% per cheering champion
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mascot.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mascot.2:BaseHealthRegen@% %i:scaleHealth% base, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mascot.2:HealthRegenPerMascot@% %i:scaleHealth% per cheering champion

Tome of Mending.description: Every @Duration@ seconds, revive the strongest ally that hasn't been revived yet at @HPPercent*100@% of their maximum Health.

Dragonlord.description:
After @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Dragonlord.1:FirstDelay@ seconds of combat, the Dragon strikes the board, dealing true damage and stunning all enemies. Allies gain Attack Speed for the rest of combat.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Dragonlord.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Dragonlord.1:TrueDamageHPRatio*100@% %i:scaleHealth% damage, Stuns for @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Dragonlord.1:StunDuration@ seconds, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Dragonlord.1:AttackSpeedBuff*100@% %i:scaleAS%.
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Dragonlord.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Dragonlord.2:TrueDamageHPRatio*100@% %i:scaleHealth% damage, Stuns for @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Dragonlord.2:StunDuration@ seconds, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Dragonlord.2:AttackSpeedBuff*100@% %i:scaleAS%.
After an additional @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Dragonlord.2:SecondDelay@ seconds, the Dragon strikes again.

Socialite.description:
Gain a spotlight hex.
Combat start: the unit standing in the spotlight gains bonus stats.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Socialite.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Socialite.1:DamagePercent*100@% %i:scaleDA% and @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Socialite.1:ManaPerSecond@ %i:scaleMana% per second.
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Socialite.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Socialite.2:DamagePercent*100@% %i:scaleDA%, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Socialite.2:ManaPerSecond@ %i:scaleMana% per second, and @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Socialite.2:OmnivampPercent*100@% %i:scaleSV%. Gain another spotlight hex.

Tome of Power.description: Kayle deals @DamageAmpPercent*100@% more damage. When she casts, she fires two waves.

Tome of Swiftness.description: Kayle deals @DamageAmpPercent*100@% more damage. Her attacks now hit in a @HexRadius@-hex radius around the target

Mountain.description:
Gain 2 Mountain hexes in the front row.
Combat start: units standing on a Mountain hex gain a Shield and permanent bonus Health.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mountain.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mountain.1:ShieldValue@ Shield, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mountain.1:PermBonusHealth@ %i:scaleHealth%.
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mountain.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mountain.2:ShieldValue@ Shield, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mountain.2:PermBonusHealth@ %i:scaleHealth%. The entire front row becomes Mountain hexes.

Shimmerscale.description:
Gain Shimmerscale items. These items give gold as well as combat power.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Shimmerscale.1:MinUnits@)Gain Goldmancers Staff. At Stage @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Shimmerscale.1:SecondItemStage@-@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Shimmerscale.1:SecondItemRound@ gain Draven's Axe.
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Shimmerscale.2:MinUnits@)Gain Crown of Champions.

Conqueror.description:
Your team's takedowns grant stacks of Conquest. After gaining enough Conquest, open War Chests full of loot!

Your team gains Attack Damage and Ability Power, increased by @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Conqueror:PercentIncreasePerChest*100@% for each War Chest opened.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Conqueror.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Conqueror.1:ADAPBase*100@% %i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%; @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Conqueror.1:StacksPerKill@x Conquest
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Conqueror.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Conqueror.2:ADAPBase*100@% %i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%; @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Conqueror.2:StacksPerKill@x Conquest

War Chests Opened: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFTEvent5YR_Conqueror_ChestsCompleted@
Current Stats: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFTEvent5YR_Conqueror_CurrentADAP@% %i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%

Punk.description:
Your team gain bonus Health, Attack Damage and Ability Power, which increases by 1% every time you spend gold on a Shop reroll.

After each combat, gain a 1 gold reroll for that round. Your first reroll each round grants @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Punk:FIRST_ROLL_BONUS@% bonus instead!

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Punk.1:MinUnits@ )@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Punk.1:BONUS_HEALTH@ %i:scaleHealth% and @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Punk.1:BONUS_AD_AP*100@% %i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Punk.2:MinUnits@ )@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Punk.2:BONUS_HEALTH@ %i:scaleHealth% and @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Punk.2:BONUS_AD_AP*100@% %i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%

Current Bonus: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFTEvent5YR_Punk_CurrentBonus@%
@TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFTEvent5YR_Punk_CurrentHealthBonus@ %i:scaleHealth% and @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFTEvent5YR_Punk_CurrentADBonus@% %i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%

Storyweaver.description:
Summon a Hero named Kayle and evolve her as you level up!

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver.1:MinUnits@) When you reach level @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver:FirstArmoryLevel@, Kayle upgrades to 2-star. Pick a supportive effect.
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver.2:MinUnits@) Kayle evolves again at levels @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver:SecondArmoryLevel@, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver:ThirdArmoryLevel@ and @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver:FourStarUpgradeLevel@:
Level @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver:SecondArmoryLevel@: Pick a combat effect.
Level @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver:ThirdArmoryLevel@: Kayle upgrades to 3-star. Pick a combat effect.
Level @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver:FourStarUpgradeLevel@: Kayle upgrades to 4-star.

Glacial.description:
Gain a Glacial Mallet. Attacks from champions holding a mallet have a @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Glacial.1:ProcPercent*100@% chance to stun their target for @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Glacial.1:StunDuration@ second and deal bonus magic damage.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Glacial.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Glacial.1:BonusDamage@ magic damage.
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Glacial.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Glacial.2:BonusDamage@ magic damage. Gain another Glacial Mallet.

Mech-Pilot.description:
Use the Pilot Selector to choose a Pilot. Combat start: the Pilot jumps into a Mech.

The Mech has the Traits and items of its Pilot, and gains a percent of the pilot's Attack Damage and max Health. When the Mech dies, the Pilot(s) are ejected with @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_MechPilot.1:EjectedPilotHealthPercent@% of their max Health.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_MechPilot.1:MinUnits@) Mini-Mech: @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_MechPilot.1:MechCombinedADRatio*100@% %i:scaleAD%%i:scaleHealth%
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_MechPilot.2:MinUnits@) Super-Mech: @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_MechPilot.2:MechCombinedADRatio*100@% %i:scaleAD%%i:scaleHealth%. The 2 nearest units to the Pilot also jump into the Mech.

Pyro.description:
Your team gains @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Pyro:BaseASPct@% %i:scaleAS% Attack Speed.

For each kill, your team creates an infernal cinder that you collect the next round. For every @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Pyro:NumCinders@ cinders you collect, your team gains @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Pyro:ASPctPerNumCinders@% more %i:scaleAS%.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Pyro.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Pyro.1:NumCindersPerKill@ infernal cinder per enemy.
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Pyro.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Pyro.2:NumCindersPerKill@ infernal cinders per enemy and execute enemies under @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Pyro.2:ExecutePct@% Health.

Cinders collected: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFTEvent5YR_PyroCindersCollected@
Team %i:scaleAS%: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFTEvent5YR_PyroAttackSpeed@%

Jazz.description:
For each active trait, your team gains bonus Health and Damage Amp.
(Excludes unique and Anniversary Traits)

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Jazz.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Jazz.1:BonusHealth*100@% %i:scaleHealth%, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Jazz.1:BonusDamage*100@% %i:scaleDA%
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Jazz.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Jazz.2:BonusHealth*100@% %i:scaleHealth%, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Jazz.2:BonusDamage*100@% %i:scaleDA%

Bonus Health: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT10_Trait_Jazz_TraitTracker_CurrentBonus@%
Bonus Damage Amp: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT10_Trait_Jazz_TraitTracker_CurrentBonus_Damage@%

Rebel.description:
Your team gains a Shield and Damage Amp for each adjacent ally.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Rebel.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Rebel.1:ShieldAmount@ Shield for @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Rebel.1:ShieldDuration@ seconds, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Rebel.1:DamageAmp@% %i:scaleDA%
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Rebel.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Rebel.2:ShieldAmount@ Shield for @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Rebel.2:ShieldDuration@ seconds, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Rebel.2:DamageAmp@% %i:scaleDA%

Talisman of Might.description: Grant Kayle and adjacent allies in the same row @APAmt@ Ability Power at the start of combat.

Talisman of Speed.description: Grant Kayle and adjacent allies in the same row @ASAmt*100@% Attack Speed at the start of combat.

Pilot Selector.description:
Use this on a champion to make it the Pilot of the Mech.

[Cannot be used on champions in combat.]
[Unlimited uses]

Sevika's Jinxed Arm.description:
At the times shown in the High Roller trait, roll a random Jinx mod:
- Rocket: Launch @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller_NumRockets@ rockets at random enemies, dealing
@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller.1:Spell1RocketADScalar*100@% Attack Damage + @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller.1:Spell1RocketAPScalar*100@% Ability Power physical damage per rocket.
- Shield: Gain a @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller_ShieldFlatAmount@ + @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller_ShieldMaxHPPercentage@% max Health Shield for @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller.1:Spell2ShieldDuration@ seconds.
- Gold: Gain @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller_GoldAmount@ gold.

Goldmancer's Staff.description:
Grant %i:scaleAP% @AbilityPowerPerGold@ Ability Power per %i:goldCoins% gold in your bank (up to %i:goldCoins% @AbilityPowerGoldMax@ gold) and a @OnKillProcChance*100@% chance to drop %i:goldCoins% @OnKillProcGold@ gold on enemy kill.

Gold generated this game: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Item_GoldGenerated@

Elderwood.description:
Every @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Elderwood.1:TickRate@ seconds your team grows, gaining bonus stats. This effect stacks up to @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Elderwood.1:MaxStacks@ times.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Elderwood.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Elderwood.1:BonusResists@ %i:scaleArmor%%i:scaleMR%, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Elderwood.1:BonusADSP@ %i:scaleAP%%i:scaleAD%
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Elderwood.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Elderwood.2:BonusResists@ %i:scaleArmor%%i:scaleMR%, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Elderwood.2:BonusADSP@ %i:scaleAP%%i:scaleAD%

Glacial Mallet.description:
Attacks have a @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFTEvent5YR_Glacial_StunChance@% chance to stun enemies for @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Glacial.1:StunDuration@ second and deal @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFTEvent5YR_Glacial_BonusDamage@ bonus magic damage.

[Unique - only 1 per champion]

The Boss.description:
Gain Boss Knuckles. When the holder first drops below @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Boss.1:HealthThreshold*100@% Health, they become The Boss and leave combat to start doing sit-ups. Each sit-up restores maximum Health and grants Attack Speed.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Boss.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Boss.1:HealPercent*100@% %i:scaleHealth%, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Boss.1:AttackSpeedPercent*100@% %i:scaleAS%.
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Boss.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Boss.2:HealPercent*100@% %i:scaleHealth%, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Boss.2:AttackSpeedPercent*100@% %i:scaleAS%. If they reach full Health they return to combat Pumped Up: all of their attacks and abilities deal @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Boss.2:TrueDamagePercentage*100@% of damage as true damage.

Yordle.description:
After each player combat, a random 1, 2 or 3 cost champion that usually fits your team is added to your bench for free.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Yordle.1:MinUnits@) Gain champions!
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Yordle.2:MinUnits@) If you have @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Yordle.2:NumOfThreeStarsNeeded@ or more 3 star champions, you instead gain a Yordle-Lord.

Phantom.description:
Combat start: random enemies have their Health reduced.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Phantom.1:MinUnits@) Set @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Phantom.1:NumUnitsToReduce@ enemy's Health to @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Phantom.1:PercentHealth*100@% maximum Health.
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Phantom.2:MinUnits@) Set @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Phantom.2:NumUnitsToReduce@ enemies' Health to @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Phantom.2:FlatHealth@.

Hellion.description:
When an allied champion dies, a Doppelhellion (a one less star copy) equipped with a Red Buff will leap from the Hellion portal and join the fight!

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Hellion.1:MinUnits@) The first @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Hellion.1:NumOfUnits@ champions
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Hellion.2:MinUnits@) The first @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Hellion.2:NumOfUnits@ champions

Scroll of Haste.description: Attacks grant Kayle @ASAmt*100@% stacking Attack Speed.

Scroll of Force.description: Kayle's Ability hits a wider area and deals @APAmt*100@% more damage.

Talisman of Aid.description: Kayle's damaging attacks and abilities @ResistPercent*100@% <TFTKeyword>Shred</TFTKeyword> and <TFTKeyword>Sunder</TFTKeyword> enemies hit for @Duration@ seconds.

Bilgewater.description:
Your team's attacks and Abilities mark enemies. The mark stores a percentage of damage dealt to the enemy.

Marked enemies are struck by a cannonball after @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Bilgewater.1:BarrageInterval@ seconds, dealing the stored damage plus a flat value as physical damage.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Bilgewater.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Bilgewater.1:Damage@ + @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Bilgewater.1:DamagePercent@% damage dealt
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Bilgewater.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Bilgewater.2:Damage@ + @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Bilgewater.2:DamagePercent@% damage dealt. Every @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Bilgewater.2:ShotsUntilTreasure@th cannonball is replaced with a treasure chest that drops gold!

Preserver.description:
Your team heals for a percent of their Max Health every @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Preserver.1:Duration@ seconds. If they are full Health, restore Mana instead.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Preserver.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Preserver.1:HealthPct*100@% %i:scaleHealth%, or @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Preserver.1:ManaPct*100@% %i:scaleMana%.
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Preserver.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Preserver.2:HealthPct*100@% %i:scaleHealth%, and @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Preserver.2:ManaPct*100@% %i:scaleMana%. Always get both.

Boss Knuckles.description:
Once per combat at 60% Health, become The Boss and leave combat to start doing sit-ups. Each sit-up restores @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFTEvent5YR_Boss_HealPercent@% max Health and grants @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFTEvent5YR_Boss_AttackSpeedPercent@% Attack Speed. If all allies die, The Boss will immediately return to combat.

[Unique - only 1 per champion]

Trainer.description:
After combat, the 3 champions closest to Nomsy feed her 1 Snax per star level, adding Health and Ability Power. Nomsy's star level increases every 25 Snax!

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Trainer.1:MinUnits@) Summon Nomsy!
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Trainer.2:MinUnits@) Nomsy's Ability deals @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Trainer.2:DamageInc*100@% bonus damage

Shurima.description:
Combat start: select champions Ascend and gain @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Shurima.1:BonusHealthPercent*100@% maximum Health %i:scaleHealth% and @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Shurima.1:BonusASPercent*100@% Attack Speed %i:scaleAS%.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Shurima.1:MinUnits@) The strongest champion Ascends after @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Shurima.1:SecondsToAscend@ seconds.
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Shurima.2:MinUnits@) The @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Shurima.2:NumUnitsToAscend@ strongest champions Ascend immediately.

Delicious Snax.description:
Nomsy needs to eat this many more Snax to level up!

[This does not count as an item.]

Draven's Axe.description:
Gain %i:scaleAD% @AttackDamagePerGold@% Attack Damage per %i:goldCoins% gold in your bank (up to %i:goldCoins% @AttackDamageGoldLimit@ gold).

Attacks grant @StacksPerAttack@ stack, up to @CashoutStacks@ times. At full stacks, grant %i:goldCoins% @CashoutGold@ gold and @CashoutComponents@ item component(s).

Gold generated this game: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Item_GoldGenerated@

Imperial.description:
Combat start: select champions gain @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Imperial.1:DamageAmp*100@% %i:scaleDA%.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Imperial.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Imperial.1:NumOfUnits@ random champions.
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Imperial.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Imperial.2:NumOfUnits@ random champions.

Coven.description:
The unit nearest to the center of your team is chosen as the Coven Leader, gaining bonus Ability Power.

Whenever your team casts an Ability, the Coven Leader gains Mana.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Coven.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Coven.1:AbilityPower@ %i:scaleAP%, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Coven.1:ManaToGive@ %i:scaleMana%
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Coven.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Coven.2:AbilityPower@ %i:scaleAP%, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Coven.2:ManaToGive@ %i:scaleMana%

Crown Of Champions.description:
Every @SecondsForEmpoweredAttack@ seconds, the next attack deals @AttackGoldMultiplier@x the amount of %i:goldCoins% gold in your bank in true damage.

[Unique - only 1 per champion]
This does no damage if you have 0 gold.

LaserCorps.description:
Your team gains laser drones. When a unit attacks or is hit by an attack, their drone deals magic damage to the target (@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_LaserCorps.1:ICD@ second cooldown). Drones are reassigned to another ally on death.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_LaserCorps.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_LaserCorps.1:MagicDamage@ magic damage.
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_LaserCorps.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_LaserCorps.2:MagicDamage@ magic damage. All units gain an additional drone.

Soul Crown.description:
Prevents the holder's first death. When they revive after 2 seconds, they shed all negative effects and gain @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Event_SF_SoulCrownHealthRestore@ Health (double your Soul Power).

Contribute +1 to the last listed Trait. (Unique traits excluded.)

[Cannot be used on champions in combat.]
[Unlimited uses.]

Imperfect Soul Crown.description:
Contribute +1 to the last listed Trait. (Unique traits excluded.)

A new effect unlocks at the start of the tournament (4-1).

[Cannot be used on champions in combat.]
[Unlimited uses.]

Hextech Sniper Rifle.description: Combat start: Fire a sniper shot that instantly executes enemies.

Darkflight Essence.description:
When the holder dies, grant this item's stats to each Darkflight champion.

[Aquired from copying a non-Craftable item or emblem via the Darkflight Trait].

Dragon Blessing.description:
Use on a Dragonmancer to make them your Dragonmancer Hero.

[Cannot be used during combat.]

Darkflight Zeke's Herald.description:
Combat start: Grant %i:scaleAS% @AttackSpeed@% Attack Speed to the holder and allies within 2 hexes in the same row.

​​This item's effect applies after Darkflight champions receive their items.

Banshee's Veil.description:
Combat start: Grant the holder and allies within @HexRange@ hexes in the same row immunity to crowd control and @BuffAttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed for @Duration@ seconds.

[Support item] [Unique - only 1 per champion]

Choncc's Prowler's Claw.description:
Combat Start: Leap to the enemy backline.

Damage from an Ability can critically strike.

[Unique - only 1 per champion]

Shadow Puppet.description:
Spawn a clone that copies the holder's items. The clone has @ClonePercentHealth*100@% max Health and deals @ClonePercentDamage*100@% damage.

[Unique - only 1 per champion]

Vanquisher Emblem.description:
The holder gains the Vanquisher trait and a @ChanceForGold@% chance to drop @GoldAmount@ gold on critical strikes.

Cooldown: @ICD@ seconds
Gold generated this game: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Item_GoldGenerated@

Longshot Emblem.description: The holder gains the Longshot trait and +@RangeIncrease@ Attack Range.

Quickstriker Emblem.description: The holder gains the Quickstriker trait.

Disruptor Emblem.description: The holder gains the Disruptor trait. Abilities deal @DOTPercent*100@% bonus magic damage over @Duration@ seconds.

Yordle Emblem.description: The holder gains the Yordle trait.

Gunslinger Emblem.description:
The holder gains the Gunslinger trait.
Dealing physical damage to an enemy reduces their Armor by @ArmorPerDamage@.

Void Emblem.description: The holder gains the Void trait.

Piltover Emblem.description: The holder gains the Piltover trait.

Bilgewater Emblem.description: The holder gains the Bilgewater trait.

Freljord Emblem.description: The holder gains the Freljord trait.

Warden Emblem.description: The holder gains the Warden trait. When a Shield on the holder breaks, heal them for @HealPercent*100@% of the Shield's initial value.

Arcanist Emblem.description: The holder gains the Arcanist trait. On kill, refund @ManaRefundRatio*100@% of the holder's max Mana.

Noxus Emblem.description: The holder gains the Noxus trait.

Zaun Emblem.description: The holder gains the Zaun trait.

Ixtal Emblem.description: The holder gains the Ixtal trait.

Ionia Emblem.description: The holder gains the Ionia trait.

Demacia Emblem.description: The holder gains the Demacia trait.

Defender Emblem.description:
The holder gains the Defender trait.
Combat Start: Gain @ResistGain*100@% more Armor OR Magic Resist from all sources, depending on whichever is higher.

Duelist Stance.description:
Passive: On attack, deal @ModifiedPassiveCloneDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage to a nearby enemy.

Active: Strike swiftly, sending @ModifiedNumClones@ (%i:scaleAS%) afterimages to the nearest @NumEnemies@ enemies. Each deals @ModifiedCloneDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage and reduces armor by @ModifiedArmorShred@ (%i:scaleAP%).

Juggernaut Stance.description: Briefly gain <scaleLevel>@WindowedDR*100@%</scaleLevel> Durability, then deal <physicalDamage>@ModifiedInitialDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%)</physicalDamage> physical damage to the target,  <physicalDamage>@ModifiedFinalDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%)</physicalDamage> physical damage to all enemies behind the target, and <physicalDamage>@ModifiedAllEnemiesDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%)</physicalDamage> physical damage to other enemies in a 2-hex radius.

Executioner Stance.description:
Deal @ModifiedStrikeDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage to the lowest Health enemy within @HexRange@ hexes and Stun them for @StunDuration@ seconds. Other enemies in a 1-hex radius take @ModifiedAOEDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage.

After @NumKills@ kills with this ability all enemies instantly take @ModifiedShockwaveDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage and are Stunned for @KillStunDuration@ seconds.

Close Armory.description: Closes the Armory. Will reopen next round with new traits.

Kingpin bonus: +@AttackSpeed_T1*100@% Attack Speed and gain @Shield_T1*100@% max Health Shield at combat start.+@AttackSpeed_T2*100@% Attack Speed and gain @Shield_T2*100@% max Health Shield at combat start.

Combination Core.description:
Mighty Mech champions heal The Mighty Mech for @TFTUnitProperty.Item:TFT15_SentaiRanger_GalioHealRatio@% of the damage they deal.

By our powers combined!

Mega Blade Upgrade.description:
Deal an additional @PercentTrueDamage*100@% of all damage dealt as true damage.

Bring down the blade of justice!

Mighty Blade.description:
Attacks now cleave in a cone dealing @ADPercent*100@% physical damage to adjacent enemies.

We slice through evil with unbreakable resolve.

Ekko's Patience.description: Total Ability damage is increased by @AbilityDA*100@%, but is dealt over @Duration@ seconds instead.

Zephyr.description:
Combat start: Summon a whirlwind on the opposite side of the arena that removes the closest enemy from combat for @BanishDuration@ seconds.

Your team gains @AllyBonusAS@% Attack Speed.

[Support item]
[Ignores crowd control immunity.]
[Unique - only 1 per champion]
@TFTUnitProperty.:TFT_BindOnEquipTRA@

Withered Relic.description: Combat Start: Increase the holder's max Health by @FlatMaxHealth@ but keep their current Health the same.

Shadow Mic.description:
Place on Kayn to unlock his Shadow vocal power, permanently improving his Reaping Slash spell to deal bonus damage at the start of combat.

[KAYN CONSUMABLE - This item disappears when used and DESTROYS the Fury Guitar]

[Can only be used during the Planning Phase]

Magnetic Remover <rules>(8 uses left!)</.description:
Use on a champion to unequip all items.

[Cannot be used on champions in combat.]
[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

Finishing Touch!.description: Your mech is complete! Rumble permanently gains @SuperPass_AP@ Ability Power and @SuperPass_Health@ Health.

Petricite Rod.description: Petricite Rod: Every @PetriciteRod_RefreshDuration@ seconds, fire a blast at the furthest enemy within 4 hexes that deals @PetriciteRod_APDamage_Level1@% / @PetriciteRod_APDamage_Level2@% / @PetriciteRod_APDamage_Level3@% %i:scaleAP% magic damage over @PetriciteRod_DOTDuration@ seconds.

Self Destruct Button.description: Self Destruct Button: Increase Armor and Magic Resist by @SelfDestruct_ResistGainIncrease*100@%. On death, deal @SelfDestruct_ResistDamage_Level1*100@% / @SelfDestruct_ResistDamage_Level2*100@% / @SelfDestruct_ResistDamage_Level3*100@% %i:scaleArmor%%i:scaleMR% as magic damage to enemies within @SelfDestruct_HexRadius@ hexes.

Junkyard Titan!.description: Junkyard Titan!: Unlock all other upgrades! Gain @DR*100@% Durability.

Flamethrower.description: Flamethrower: Constantly deal @Flamethrower_Damage_Level1@% / @Flamethrower_Damage_Level2@% / @Flamethrower_Damage_Level3@% %i:scaleAP% magic damage in a cone.

Spare Parts!.description: Keep your gold! Rumble permanently gains @Pass_AP@ Ability Power and @Pass_Health@ Health.

Use on a champion to unequip all items.

[Cannot be used on champions in combat.]

[Unique - only 1 per champion]

Needlessly Big Gem.description:
Your team gains @BaseBonusDamage*100@% Damage Amp. Each second the holder is alive, your team gains an additional @AmpPerSec*100@% Damage Amp, up to a total of @MaxDamageAmp*100@%.

​​[Support item]

Orb of Greed.description:
Risky! Summon the Golden Dragon Bank. Losing combat stores gold in the bank based on loss streak and stage. Win to convert it into loot and gold.

Gold generated by Shimmerscale items gets stored in the Golden Dragon Bank with a @BonusGoldRatio*100@% conversion rate.

The equipped unit has a @GoldChance@% chance to grant @PointsPerKill@ gold on takedowns.

Determined Investor.description: After dying during combat @StackLimit@ times, this item is destroyed. Upon destruction, grant the item Diamond Hands, 1 Champion Duplicator, and %i:goldCoins% @GoldGranted@ gold.

Mogul's Mail.description:
Grants @BaseResistsPerStack@ Armor, @BaseResistsPerStack@ Magic Resist, and @BaseHealthPerStack@ Health when taking damage, stacking up to @StackCap@ times.

At full stacks, grant %i:goldCoins% @GoldAtFullStacks@ gold and continue gaining %i:goldCoins% @GoldAtFullStacks@ gold every @GoldInterval@ seconds.

Gold generated this game: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Item_GoldGenerated@

[Unique - only 1 per champion]

Crown of Champions.description: Every @SecondsForEmpoweredAttack@ seconds, the next attack deals @AttackGoldMultiplier@x the amount of %i:goldCoins% gold in your bank in true damage.

Gambler's Blade.description:
Grant %i:scaleAS% @AttackSpeedPerGold*100@% bonus Attack Speed per %i:goldCoins% gold in your bank (up to %i:goldCoins% @AttackSpeedGoldLimit@ gold).

Each attack has a @ChanceToProc*100@% chance to drop %i:goldCoins% @GoldPerProc@ gold.

Gold generated this game: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Item_GoldGenerated@

[Unique - only 1 per champion]

Trickster's Glass.description:
Summon a clone with @HealthPercent@% base Health and +@ManaIncrease*100@% max Mana. You cannot equip items to the clone.

The clone benefits from active traits

[Unique - only 1 per champion]

Eternal Pact.description:
Combat start: Form a pact with the highest Health allied champion, if they die, gain @ManaRegenToGrant@ Mana regen and @APToGrant@% Ability Power.

When the ally uses their ability, gain @ManaToGrant@ Mana. Every @ShieldCadence@ seconds, shield your ally for @PercentAPShield*100@% of the holder's Ability Power.

TFT17_FavoredCause_DealDamage.description: When an Arbiter deals damage @DamageInstances@ times,

TFT17_FavoredCause_CombatStartRerolled.description: Combat start: if you rerolled during the previous planning phase,

TFT17_FavoredCause_EveryInterest.description: Combat Start: For each interest you would gain, also

TFT17_FavoredCause_StarLevels.description: Combat Start: For each Arbiter star level,

TFT17_FavoredEffect_GenerateGold.description: You have a @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT17_Favored_EffectData_One_AmountSubstring@% chance to gain @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT17_Favored_EffectData_Three_AmountSubstring@ gold at combat end.

TFT17_FavoredEffect_GainLeona.description: You have a @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT17_Favored_EffectData_One_AmountSubstring@% chance to gain a Leona at combat end.

TFT17_FavoredEffect_GainsArmor.description: All Arbiters gain @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT17_Favored_EffectData_One_AmountSubstring@ Armor and Magic Resist.

TFT17_FavoredEffect_GenerateReroll.description: You have a @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT17_Favored_EffectData_One_AmountSubstring@% chance to gain @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT17_Favored_EffectData_Three_AmountSubstring@ free reroll at combat end.

TFT17_FavoredEffect_GainsPermanentMaxHea.description: All Arbiters gain @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT17_Favored_EffectData_One_AmountSubstring@ permanent max Health.

TFT17_FavoredEffect_GainShield.description: All Arbiters gain a @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT17_Favored_EffectData_One_AmountSubstring@% max Health Shield for @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT17_Favored_EffectData_Three_AmountSubstring@ seconds.

TFT17_FavoredCause_FallBelowXHealth.description: The first time each Arbiter drops below @HealthThreshold*100@% health,

Trash to Treasure: Completed items transform into Artifacts and do not consume the Reforger

Cannot be used on a champion already on a Street Demon hex. Can only be used during planning phase.

Predator Instincts.description:

Recommended users: Rek'Sai and Bel'Veth

Adrenaline Modules.description:
Gain @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT16_Void_AdrenalineModulesDamageAmp@% Damage Amp, increased by @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT16_Void_AdrenalineModulesDamageAmpPerTick@% after every @AttackNumBreakpoint@ attacks.

Recommended users: Bel'Veth and Kai'sa

Iron Carapace.description:
Gain @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT16_Void_IronCarapaceHealth@ max Health. Gain Armor and Magic Resist equal to @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT16_Void_IronCarapaceArmorMR@% of max Health.

Recommended users: Cho'Gath and Rift Herald

Spitter Spines.description:
After dealing @DamageRequirement@ damage, fire spikes at the @NumTargets@ nearest enemies that deal @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT16_Void_SpitterSpinesDamage@ physical damage.

Recommended users: Rek'Sai, Malzahar, and Kai'sa

Royal Husk.description:
Gain @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT16_Void_RoyalHuskHealth@ + @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT16_Void_RoyalHuskPercentHealth*100@% Health. After dropping below @FirstHealthThreshold*100@% max Health, spawn a Voidling with @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT16_Void_RoyalHuskSummonMaxHealth@% of this unit's max Health.

Recommended users: Cho'Gath and Rift Herald

Leeching Nucleus.description:
Heal the lowest Health ally for @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT16_Void_LeechingHealPercent@% of damage dealt. After damaging an enemy, steal @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT16_Void_LeechingADAP@% Attack Damage and Ability Power from them, up to @MaxADAPSteal@ stacks from all sources.

Recommended users: Kog'Maw, Malzahar, and Kai'sa

Radiant Gambler's Blade.description:
Grant %i:scaleAS% @AttackSpeedPerGold*100@% bonus Attack Speed per %i:goldCoins% gold in your bank (up to %i:goldCoins% @AttackSpeedGoldLimit@ gold). Each attack has a @ChanceToProc*100@% chance to drop %i:goldCoins% @GoldPerProc@ gold.

Gold generated this game: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Item_GoldGenerated@

Radiant Goldmancer's Staff.description:
Grant %i:scaleAP% @AbilityPowerPerGold@ Ability Power per %i:goldCoins% gold in your bank (up to %i:goldCoins% @AbilityPowerGoldMax@ gold) and a @OnKillProcChance*100@% chance to drop %i:goldCoins% @OnKillProcGold@ gold on enemy kill.

Gold generated this game: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Item_GoldGenerated@

Radiant Determined Investor.description: After dying during combat @StackLimit@ times, this item is destroyed. Upon destruction, grant the item Radiant Diamond Hands, 1 Champion Duplicator, and %i:goldCoins% <TFTRadiantItemBonus>@GoldGranted@</TFTRadiantItemBonus> gold.

Radiant Crown of Champions.description: Every <TFTRadiantItemBonus>@SecondsForEmpoweredAttack@</TFTRadiantItemBonus> seconds, the next attack deals @AttackGoldMultiplier@x the amount of %i:goldCoins% gold in your bank in true damage.

Radiant Draven's Axe.description:
Gain %i:scaleAD% @AttackDamagePerGold@% Attack Damage per %i:goldCoins% gold in your bank (up to %i:goldCoins% @AttackDamageGoldLimit@ gold).

Attacks grant @StacksPerAttack@ stack, up to @CashoutStacks@ times. At full stacks, grant %i:goldCoins% @CashoutGold@ gold and @CashoutComponents@ item component(s).

Gold generated this game: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Item_GoldGenerated@

Radiant Orb of Greed.description:
Risky! Summon the Golden Dragon Bank. Losing combat stores gold in the bank based on your loss streak. Win to convert it into loot and gold.

Gold generated by Shimmerscale items gets stored in the Golden Dragon Bank with a @BonusGoldRatio*100@% conversion rate.

The equipped unit has a @GoldChance@% chance to grant @PointsPerKill@ gold on takedowns.

Radiant Mogul's Mail.description:
Grants @BaseResistsPerStack@ Armor, @BaseResistsPerStack@ Magic Resist, and @BaseHealthPerStack@ Health when taking damage, stacking up to @StackCap@ times.

At full stacks, grant %i:goldCoins% @GoldAtFullStacks@ gold.

Gold generated this game: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Item_GoldGenerated@

Radiant Diamond Hands.description: Once per combat: At @HPThreshold1*100@% Health and @HPThreshold2*100@% Health, become invulnerable for @BaseDamageImmunityTime@ second and grant %i:goldCoins% <TFTRadiantItemBonus>@GoldPerImmunityProc@</TFTRadiantItemBonus> gold.

Radiant Needlessly Big Gem.description:
If the holder is alive after @ProcTimeInSeconds@ seconds, your team deals @BonusDamagePerGold*100@% more damage per %i:goldCoins% gold in your bank (up to %i:goldCoins% @GoldLimit@ gold). For every @UnitsPerGold@ units alive when this happens, gain @GoldAmount@ gold.

Gold generated this game: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Item_GoldGenerated@

Ace.description: Cause this unit to deal @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT_UnitProperty_Debug@% damage on their next attack.

Lich Bane.description:
The holder's first attack after each Ability cast deals @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Item_Artifact_LichBane_Damage@ bonus magic damage.

Damage increases based on Stage.

Striker's Flail.description: Critical Strikes grant @BuffDamageAmp*100@% Damage Amp for @Duration@ seconds, stacking up to @MaxStacks@ times.

TFT_Item_EmptyBag.description: <tftrules> This transforms into a random item at the start of combat!</tftrules>

Light Transformer.description:
Turns all items on a champion into standard items when used.

[CONSUMABLE - This item disappears when used.]
This Item cannot transform Force of Darkness, which is beyond redemption.

Sentinel Swarm.description: Every 3 seconds, summon a powerful Sentinel equipped with Completed, Artifact, and Radiant items.

Rhaast's Embrace.description:
Place on Kayn to force Rhaast to overtake him, permanently improving his Reaping Slash spell to heal him.

[KAYN CONSUMABLE - This item disappears when used and DESTROYS Kayn's Liberation]

[Can only be used during the Planning Phase]

Forbidden Idol.description: Shields have @PercentShieldConversion@% of their value converted to max Health instead.

Miniature Champion.description:
Gain @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT13_GoopBuff_Miniaturize_AP@ %i:scaleAP% Ability Power, @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT13_GoopBuff_Miniaturize_AD@ %i:scaleAD% Attack Damage, @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT13_GoopBuff_Miniaturize_Armor@ %i:scaleArmor% Armor, and @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT13_GoopBuff_Miniaturize_MR@ %i:scaleMR% Magic Resist.

Original Champion: @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT13_JunkerKing_FlamethrowerTRA@

Arbiter Emblem.description: The holder gains the Arbiter trait.

Anima Emblem.description: The holder gains the Anima trait.

Timebreaker Emblem.description: The holder gains the Timebreaker trait.

N.O.V.A. Emblem.description:
The holder gains the N.O.V.A. trait.

N.O.V.A. Strike: Gain @ASStriker*100@% Attack Speed and @ArmorStriker@ Armor and Magic Resist. Other allies gain @ASTeam*100@% Attack Speed and @ArmorTeam@ Armor and Magic Resist.

Meeple Emblem.description: The holder gains the Meeple trait and @ManaRegenPerMeep@ additional Mana Regen per %i:set14AmpIcon%.

Shepherd Emblem.description: The holder gains the Shepherd trait. On cast, grant @ManaSharePercent*100@% of max Mana to the Bond of the Stars.

Psionic Emblem.description: The holder gains the Psionic trait.

Rogue Emblem.description: The holder gains the Rogue trait. At @HealthThreshold*100@% health, gain @Omnivamp*100@% Omnivamp and immunity to crowd control for @BuffDuration@ seconds.

Challenger Emblem.description: The holder gains the Challenger trait. On takedown, the holder's next @NumAttacks@ attacks each heal for @PercentHealthHeal*100@% of max health.

Dark Star Emblem.description: The holder gains the Dark Star trait.

Stargazer Emblem.description: The holder gains the Stargazer trait.

Marauder Emblem.description:
The holder gains the Marauder trait and has a @GoldDropChance@% chance to drop @GoldAmount@ gold on kill.

Gold dropped this game: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Item_GoldGenerated@

Space Groove Emblem.description: The holder gains the Space Groove trait. On cast, the holder enters {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_TheGroove}} for @GrooveDuration@ seconds.

Voyager Emblem.description:
The holder gains the Voyager trait.

Combat Start: Gain and grant adjacent allies bonuses based on the holder's role.
- Tanks: @BonusArmorMR@ Armor and Magic Resist
- Fighters/Assassins: @BonusOmnivamp*100@% Omnivamp
- Other Roles: @BonusAttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed

Primordian Emblem.description: The holder gains the Primordian trait.

Eagle's Antimagic.description: Your team gains temporary magic resist.

Blue Buff.description: Gain @ModifiedADAP*100@% additional Attack Damage and Ability Power from all sources.

Guardian Angel.description:
Prevents the holder's first death, placing them in stasis instead. After @StasisDuration@ seconds, they return with @HealthRestore@ Health and shed all negative effects.

[Unique - Only One Per Champion]

Changing Glamour.description:
Use this on the Changeling to transform them into a new champion!

Refreshes each round

Mirrored Persona.description:
Every @NumCombats@ player combats gain a lesser copy of Mirrored Persona (@TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT_Item_Artifact_MirroredPersona_Combats@/@NumCombats@).

Share @StatSharePercent*100@% of the holder's bonus Attack Damage, Ability Power, Attack Speed, Armor, Magic Resist, and Health with other Mirrored Persona holders.

Can't be Reforged, Lesser copies do not produce copies.
Unique: one per champion

Soul Eater.description: Gain a Nasus. Your strongest Nasus becomes a Fighter. He now slams his staff on enemies, dealing physical damage. If this kills the enemy, Nasus gains permanent Attack Damage.

Cosmic Hemomancy.description: Gain a Vladimir. Your strongest Vladimir becomes a Caster. He no longer Heals, but gains 2 range and every fourth cast damages enemies in an area around his target. Enemies damaged lose Magic Resist.

A Hungry Snack.description: Consume @HealthToFeed@ player health for Health %i:scaleHealth%, Attack Damage %i:scaleAD% and Ability Power %i:scaleAP%.

Tattoo of Vitality.description: Attacks heal the holder for @HealthRatio*100@% of their max Health and deal the same amount as bonus magic damage.

Tattoo of Force.description: Whenever the holder acquires a new target they run quickly to and briefly stun them, dealing @Damage@ magic damage, and double the stats from this item for @BuffDuration@ seconds.

Tattoo of Bombardment.description: Every 3rd attack fires bolts at the 2 lowest percent health enemies which deal @ADPercent@% Attack Damage as physical damage.

Tattoo of Protection.description: Gain a @HealthShieldRatio*100@% Shield after casting the first time each combat. When it breaks, grant @AllyShieldRatio*100@% of this shield amount to the 2 nearest allies.

Tattoo of Toxin.description:
Damage applies a toxin that deals an additional @DamageRatio*100@% of that damage over @Duration@ seconds and @HealingReductionPct@% Wounds the target.

Wound: Reduces healing received

Tattoo of Fury.description: Deal @BonusRatio*100@% bonus damage to targets below half health. On takedown, gain @AttackSpeedPercent@% attack speed for @Duration@ seconds.

Fishbones.description: The holder's attacks target random enemies.

Gargoyle Stoneplate.description: Gain @ArmorPerEnemy@ Armor and @MRPerEnemy@ Magic Resist for each enemy targeting the holder.

Titanic Hydra.description: Attacks deal @PercentMaxHealthSplash@% of the holder's max Health plus @PercentAttackDamageSplash@% of their Attack Damage as bonus physical damage to the target and adjacent enemies.

Bramble Vest.description:
Gain @PercentMaxHP*100@% max health.

Take @AutoDamageReduction*100@% reduced damage from attacks. When struck by any attack, deal @1StarAoEDamage@ magic damage to all adjacent enemies.

Cooldown: @ICD@ seconds

Choncc's Rocket-Propelled Fist.description:
Combat start: The farthest enemy is pulled into melee range and Stunned for @StunDuration@ seconds. Allies within range will prioritize attacking that enemy.

[Unique - only 1 per champion]
Stun: cannot move, attack, or cast Abilities

Aegis of Dusk.description:
Every @TickRate@ seconds, steal @MRStealPerTick@ Magic Resist from enemies within 1 hex and deal @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Item_Artifact_AegisDuskDawn_Damage@% of the holder's Magic Resist as magic damage.

If Aegis of Dawn is also equipped, trigger this item's effect every @TickRateWithAegisOfDawn@ seconds instead.

Damage increases based on Stage.

Fury Guitar.description:
Place on Kayn to unleash his Fury Rapper energy, permanently improving his Reaping Slash Ability to heal him.

[KAYN CONSUMABLE - This item disappears when used and DESTROYS the Shadow Mic]

[Can only be used during the Planning Phase]

Pocket Recombobulator<br><br>.description:
Use on a 1 or 2 cost champion to upgrade them to a unit of 1 higher cost.

Not for use on living, mechanical, experimental, imaginary, or reanimated creatures . Keep out of reach of Yordles.

Unending Despair.description: Whenever a Shield on the holder breaks, @PercentDamage@% of that Shield's initial value is dealt to the nearest enemy as magic damage.

Locket of the Silver Lunari.description: Combat start: The holder and all allies within @HexRange@ hexes in the same row gain <TFTShadowItemBonus>@BonusDefenses@ bonus Armor and Magic Resist</TFTShadowItemBonus>, <TFTShadowItemPenalty>but gain 5 less Mana per attack.</TFTShadowItemPenalty>

Chalice of Malice.description: Combat start: Grant %i:scaleAP% <TFTShadowItemBonus>@BonusAP@ Ability Power</TFTShadowItemBonus> to allies within @HexRange@ hex in the same row. <TFTShadowItemPenalty>The holder loses %i:scaleAP% @APLost@ Ability Power instead of gaining any.</TFTShadowItemPenalty>

Turbulent Zephyr.description:
Combat start: Summon a whirlwind on the opposite side of the arena that removes the closest enemy from combat for @BanishDuration@ seconds. Once the enemy returns to combat, they gain 30 bonus attack damage and 30 ability power for the rest of combat.

[Ignores CC immunity]
[Unique - only 1 per champion]

Dark Shroud of Stillness.description:
Combat start: Shoot a beam straight ahead and behind that @CostIncrease@% Mana Reaves enemies and other allies.

[Unique - only 1 per champion]
Mana Reave: increase maximum Mana until the next cast

Eternal Winter.description:
Enemies who damage the holder are @AttackSpeedSlowPercent@% Chilled for @SlowDuration@ seconds. After @NumApplications@ Chills from this item, the attacker is Stunned instead (Cooldown: @FreezeCooldown@ seconds).

[Unique - only 1 per champion]
Chill: reduce Attack Speed
Stun: cannot move, attack, or cast Abilities

Yasuo's Bladework.description: Every @Interval@ seconds, your next attack is a double attack.

Baron Nashor's Head.description: <tftitemrules>The terror from the Void was no match for the ingenuity, firepower, and weapons of dubious legality from Piltover.</tftitemrules>

Replicator Mode.description: Miss Fortune gains the Replicator trait.

Conduit Mode.description: Miss Fortune gains the Conduit trait.

Challenger Mode.description: Miss Fortune gains the Challenger trait.

Onslaught.description: Aphelios enters an onslaught, slinging chakrams and dealing massive damage to nearby enemies.

Duskwave.description: Aphelios unleashes a wave of energy in a cone in his target's direction, locking onto and dealing damage to all enemies hit.

Binding Eclipse.description: Aphelios casts forth a lunar spotlight towards the largest group of units, stunning all enemies hit and dealing damage to them.

Blademaster Emblem.description: The holder gains the Blademaster trait.

Battlecast Emblem.description: The holder gains the Battlecast trait.

Infiltrator Emblem.description: The holder gains the Infiltrator trait.

Celestial Emblem.description: The holder gains the Celestial trait.

Mending Echoes.description: Increase healing on the holder by @IncreasedHealing*100@%. When the holder gives or receives a heal, grant @HealPercentToGrant*100@% of the heals value to the lowest health ally as well.

Obsidian Cleaver.description:
Damage dealt @Shred@% Shreds and @Shred@% Sunders enemies for @Duration@ seconds.

Your team gains @TeamAD*100@% Attack Damage and @TeamAP@ Ability Power.

​​[Support item] [Unique - only 1 per champion]
Shred: Reduce Magic Resist
Sunder: Reduce Armor

Virtue of the Martyr.description:
Every @HealTickRate@ seconds, heal your team for @MaxHealthHeal@% of their max Health. When the holder dies, the healing increases to @TOOLTIPEmpoweredHeal@% max Health for @NumBonusHeals@ extra heals.

Healing: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Tracker_Value1@

​​[Support item]

Thresh's Lantern.description:
After @Delay@ seconds of combat, pull the leftmost benched unit onto the battlefield. While that unit lives, @DamageShare*100@% of all damage the holder would take is redirected to them.

Traits of champions flung onto the board do not become active

A Chromatic Snack.description: Consume @HealthToFeed@ player health for Health %i:scaleHealth% and Damage Amp %i:scaleDA%.

Confiscated!.description: This dangerous item has been confiscated by the Enforcers. You can have it back after serving your time.

Divine Dissolver.description:
Use on a champion to break apart all items into components and unequip them.

[Cannot be used on board champions in combat.]
[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

Edge of Night.description: At @HealthThreshold@% Health, briefly become untargetable, shed negative effects, and heal @MissingHealthRestore*100@% missing health.

Kayle's Exaltation.description: After @Delay@ seconds of combat, this and all completed items on the holder become Radiant.

Crest Of Cinders.description:
Combat start: the holder and allies within @HexRange@ hexes in the same row gain the Crest of Cinders.

Champions holding the Crest of Cinders empower their attacks to Burn their target for @BurnAmount*100@% of their max Health as true damage and apply 33% Wound.

[Unique - only one per champion]

Deathblade.description:
Perfect peace and calm for the holder - and all who face it.

@TFTUnitProperty.:TFT_Augment_TragicalBlade_TRAKey@

Cursed Blade.description: Attacks reduce the target's max Health by @MaxHealthPercent@%. @HitCount@ attacks on the same target reduces their star level by 1.

Zhonya's Paradox.description:
Once per combat at @PercentHealthThreshold@% Health, become invulnerable and untargetable for @InvulnDuration@ seconds.

[Unique - only 1 per champion]

Titan's Resolve.description:
Gain @StackingAD*100@% Attack Damage and @StackingSP@% Ability Power when attacking or taking damage, stacking up to @StackCap@ times.

At full stacks, gain @StackedAmp*100@% Damage Amp and gain immunity to crowd control.

Charges.description:
Start with @TooltipStartingCharge@ Charge. Gain Charges each time you lose. The larger your loss streak, the more Charges you gain per loss. When you win, all Charges are converted to Power for the T-Hex.

Current loss streak: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT9_Piltover_Charges@ (doubled in Hyper Roll)
Charges granted next loss: +@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT9_Piltover_ChargesToGrant@
Current loot value on victory: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT9_Piltover_ProgressGoldValue@ gold

[This does not count as an item.]

Knight's Vow.description:
Extra %i:scaleArmor% +@Armor@
Holder is also a Knight

[Unique - only 1 per champion]

Hunger For Power Anomaly.description:
Use on a unit to grant them the Hunger For Power anomaly. Sell the unit to regain this consumable.

Hunger For Power
Combat start: Consume an adjacent ally Champion and gain @HealthAndADPercent_TOOLTIPONLY@% of their Health and Attack Damage.

[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

Choncc's Chalice.description:
Your team gains +@MaxArmySizeIncrease@ max team size.

@PercentGoldChance@% chance to drop 1 gold when you win combat.

"Only the finest beverages can go into Choncc's Chalice"

Luden's Tempest.description: @PercentOfOverkill@% of overkill damage plus @BaseDamage@ is dealt as magic damage to the three enemies nearest the target.

Spectral Cutlass.description: Combat start: Teleport the holder to the mirrored hex on the enemy's side of the board. After @Duration@ seconds, the holder returns to their original location.

Kraken's Fury.description: Attacks grant @ADOnAttack*100@% stacking Attack Damage, up to @MaxStacks@ attacks. After @MaxStacks@ attacks, gain @ASCapstone*100@% Attack Speed.

Damage Amp.description: Cause this unit to deal  @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT_UnitProperty_Debug@% increased damage. Does not stack. Lasts until the unit is deconstructed.

Crown of Demacia.description:
If the holder is a Tank, regenerate @HealingPercentPerTickPerStage@-@HealingPercentPerTickPerStage*7@% maximum Health every @HealTickRate@ seconds (based on stage). Otherwise, gain @ADandAPPerTick@% %i:scaleAD% Attack Damage and %i:scaleAP% Ability Power every @HealTickRate@ seconds instead.

If the holder of this item dies, you instantly lose the fight.

You can remove this item by benching the holder.

Crystalline Reinforcements.description: Your team gains @Health@ health. Whenever a unit dies, a crystalline copy one star level lower joins the fight!

Rapid Firecannon.description: Gain +1 Attack Range, increased by 1 whenever the holder kills an enemy.

Golden Item Remover.description: Use on a champion to unequip all items as many times as you want. Converts all future Magnetic Removers to Reforgers.

Bloodthirster.description: Once per combat at @HealthThreshold@% Health, gain a @ShieldHealthPercent@% max Health Shield that lasts up to @ShieldDuration@ seconds.

Statikk Shiv.description: Every 3rd attack deals @Damage@ + @APScalar*100@% of the holder's Ability Power as additional magic damage to 4 enemies.

Sniper's Focus.description: Gain @DamageAmpPerHex*100@% Damage Amp against targets @HexRequirement@ or more hexes away.

Unstable Treasure Chest.description:
When the holder dies, the @ItemsGranted@ highest percent health allies gain a temporary completed item.

​​[Support item]

Archangel's Staff.description: Combat start: Gain @APPerInterval@% Ability Power every @IntervalSeconds@ seconds in combat.

Aegis of Dawn.description:
Every @TickRate@ seconds, steal @ArmorStealPerTick@ Armor from enemies within 1-hex and heal @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Item_Artifact_AegisDuskDawn_Damage@% of the holder's Armor.

If Aegis of Dusk is also equipped, trigger this item's effect every @TickRateWithAegisOfDusk@ seconds instead.

Healing increases based on Stage.

Evelynn's Instinct.description:
When switching targets, blink to the next target. Attacks and Abilities execute the holder's target below @ExecuteThresholdForTarget*100@% of their Health.

Kills grant the holder @DecayingAS*100@% Attack Speed decaying over @Duration@ seconds.

Soraka's Miracle.description:
The first @NumMiracles@ times the holder drops below @HPThreshold*100@% Health, a Miracle occurs, healing them for @TotalHealRatio@% of their max Health.

If the holder survives player combat, gain @PlayerHealth@ player Health for each Miracle this combat.

Varus's Obsession.description:
Combat Start: Your strongest Tank becomes the Soulmate. For each second they are alive, the holder gains @StackingStats@% stacking Attack Damage and Ability Power.

The Soulmate heals for @HealPct*100@% of damage the holder deals.

Taunt.description: Taunt all enemies who are in range to attack the target.

Dawncore.description: Reduce the holder's max Mana by @FlatManaReduction@. Subsequent spellcasts reduce max Mana by @ReductionPerCast*100@%, to a minimum of @MinimumTotalMana@.

EDM Selector.description:
Use this on an EDM champion to select them. The selected champion determines the frequency of EDM casts.

Jax: Every @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT10_Trait_EDM_JaxFrequency@ seconds.
Lux: Every @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT10_Trait_EDM_LuxFrequency@ seconds.
Zac: Every @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT10_Trait_EDM_ZacFrequency@ seconds.
Zed: Every @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT10_Trait_EDM_ZedFrequency@ seconds.

Choncc's Artifactory.description: At the start of each turn, your benched completed items transform into a random Artifact item. Gain @NumItems@ Artifact Anvil and a reforger.

Ahri's Aura.description:
The holder is orbited by 3 foxfires. Each one deals @FlatMagicDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage and the orbit expands to hit the holder's current target.

For every @ManaSpent@ Mana the holder spends, foxfires travel @PercentSpeedIncrease*100@% faster for the rest of combat.

The Eternal Flame.description:
While the holder is alive, all enemies are @TOOLTIPWoundAmount@% Wounded and all allies gain @DamageAmp*100@% Damage Amp. This effect refreshes every @WoundDuration@ seconds.

​​[Support item]
Wound: Reduces healing received

Lightshield Crest.description:
Every @TriggerRate@ seconds, Shields the lowest percent Health ally for @PercentOfResists@% of the holder's combined Armor and Magic Resist for @ShieldDuration@ seconds.

On death grants this shield to all allies.

Mecha-Former.description:
Use this on a Mecha unit to change their form.

Transformed Mechas take up two team slots and count twice for the Mecha trait.

Death's Defiance.description:
@IgnorePainPercent@% of the damage the holder receives is instead dealt over @BleedDuration@ seconds as non-lethal damage.

[Unique - only 1 per champion]

Youmuu's Ghostblade.description:
The holder is also an Assassin.

[Unique - only 1 per champion]

Evenshroud.description:
@ARReductionAmount@% Sunder enemies within @HexRange@ hexes. Gain @BonusResists@ Armor and Magic Resist for the first @BonusResistDuration@ seconds of combat.

Sunder: Reduce Armor

Blacksmith's Gloves.description:
Each round: Equip 2 random Ornn Artifacts.

[Consumes 3 item slots.]
@TFTUnitProperty.:TFT_BindOnEquipTRA@

Blighting Jewel.description:
Dealing magic damage reduces the target's Magic Resist by @MRReduction@. If their Magic Resist is 0, grant the holder @ManaGain@ Mana instead.

Ability damage can only trigger on each enemy once every @ICD@ seconds.

Talisman Of Ascension.description: After @Seconds@ seconds gain @MaxHealthPercent@% max Health and @DamageAmp*100@% Damage Amp for the rest of combat.

Nashor's Tooth.description: Attacks grant @BaseManaOnHit@ bonus Mana, increased to @ManaOnCrit@ if they critically strike.

Suspicious Trench Coat.description:
Once per combat at @PercentHealthTrigger@% Health, the holder splits into 3 copies of themself each with @PercentHealthOfCopies@% of their max Health.

[Unique - only 1 per champion]

Morellonomicon.description:
Attacks and Abilities deal @BurnPercent@% Burn and @GrievousWoundsPercent@% Wound to enemies for @BurnDuration@ seconds.

Burn: Deals a percent of the target's max Health as true damage every second
Wound: Reduces healing received

Red Buff.description:
Attacks and Abilities @BurnPercent@% Burn and @HealingReductionPct@% Wound enemies for @Duration@ seconds.

Burn: Deals a percent of the target's max Health as true damage every second
Wound: Reduces healing received

Training Dummy.description:
Use on a champion to spawn a movable Training Dummy nearby.

[Cannot be used in combat.
Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

Crownguard.description:
Combat Start: Gain a @ShieldSize@% max Health Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds.

When the Shield expires, gain @ShieldBonusAP@% Ability Power.

Mittens.description:
Shrinks the holder, granting them increased movement speed and immunity to Slow, Burn, and Wound.

{{TFT_Keyword_Chill}}
{{TFT_Keyword_Burn}}
{{TFT_Keyword_Wound}}

Power.description:
Gain Power by winning combats after gaining Charges. More Power gives more stats.

[This does not count as an item.]

Adaptive Helm.description:
Gain an additional @ManaPercIncrease*100@% Mana from all sources. The holder gains an additional bonus based on their Role:

Tanks and Fighters: Gain @FrontlineResists@ Armor and Magic Resistance.

Other Roles: Gain @BacklineADAP@% Attack Damage and Ability Power.

Deathfire Grasp.description: Combat start: Blast the current target for @PercentMaxHealthDamage@% of their max Health as magic damage. Repeat this every @RepeatTime@ seconds.

Combat start: The holder and all adjacent allies gain @ADIncrease*100@% Attack Damage and @APIncrease@ Ability Power.

Damage increases based on Stage.

Horizon Focus.description: Stunning an enemy causes lightning to strike them, dealing @PercentHealthDamage@% of their max Health as magic damage.

Randuin's Omen.description:
Combat start: Grant %i:scaleArmor% @BonusDefense@ Armor and %i:scaleMR% @BonusDefense@ Magic Resistance to the holder and adjacent allies.

​​[Support item]

Prowler's Claw.description: After killing a target, shed negative effects and dash to the farthest target within @HexRange@ hexes. The next 2 critical attacks deal @CritDamageBonusPercent@% bonus Critical Strike Damage.

Moonstone Renewer.description:
Every @ShieldRate@ seconds, grant a @BaseShieldAmount@-@MaxShield@ Shield (based on Stage) to the @ShieldTargets@ lowest percent health allies for @ShieldDuration@ seconds.

​​[Support item]

Aegis of the Legion.description:
Combat start: Grant @ASBuff@% Attack Speed and @BonusResists@ Armor and Magic Resist to the holder, adjacent allies in the same row, and all allies behind them for @BuffDuration@ seconds.

Gain @ProcAttackSpeed*100@% stacking Attack Speed every second.

@PercentGoldChance@% chance to drop 1 gold when you win combat.

Combat start: Store @InitialPercentHealthStore*100@% max Health and @PercentHealthStore*100@% more every second. On death, unleash the stored Health as magic damage split between enemies within @HexRadius@-hexes.

Grants immunity to Stuns and the holder's attacks Stun the target for @StunDuration@ seconds.

The holder's Attack Speed is locked at @AttackSpeedCap@.

Use on a champion to open an armory of items especially suited for them.

These items are based on the champion's recommended items.

Sacrificial Redemption.description: The holder radiates an aura to <TFTShadowItemBonus>all allies on the board</TFTShadowItemBonus> except themself, and heals them for <TFTShadowItemPenalty>@MissingHealthHeal@%</TFTShadowItemPenalty> of their missing Health every @HealTickRate@ seconds.

Caustic Quicksilver.description:
The holder gains immunity to crowd control for the entirety of combat.

[Unique - only one per champion]

Hand of Vengeance.description:
At the beginning of combat, the holder gains both of the following:
  • +@BonusAD@ Attack Damage and +@BonusSP@ Ability Power.
  • Attacks and Abilities heal for @TraitMultiplier@% of damage dealt.

    • These bonuses expire after each takedown, and renew on the next.

Sacrificial Infinity Edge.description:
Grants @CritChance@% Critical Strike Chance (including components). Each point of Critical Strike Chance above 100% becomes +@BonusCritDmgPerCritAbove100@% Critical Strike Damage.

The holder also gains @BonusCritDamage@% Critical Strike Damage.

[Unique - only one per champion]

Refracted Dragon's Claw.description:
Reduces incoming magic damage by @MagicReduction@%.

Negates bonus damage from incoming critical hits.

Final Whisper.description:
The holder's attacks and abilities reduce the target's Armor and Magic Resist by @ArmorMRReductionPercent@% for the rest of combat.


[Unique - only one per champion]

Archdemon's Staff Of Immortality.description: Each time the holder casts their Ability, they gain empty maximum Health equal to @ManaRatio@% of their maximum Mana. The holder then heals for that amount.

Sacrificial Gauntlet.description:
The holder gains @CritDamageAmp@% Critical Strike Damage, and magic and true damage from their Ability can critically strike.

The first time they cast their Ability each combat, they gain an additional @BonusCritChance@% Critical Strike Chance for the remainder of combat (applies to that Ability cast).

Riskthirster.description: Physical damage heals the holder for @Lifesteal@% of the damage dealt. <TFTShadowItemBonus>Each time the holder heals to @HealthThresholdPercent@% Health, they gain @BonusAS@% Attack Speed for @BonusASDuration@ seconds.</TFTShadowItemBonus> <TFTShadowItemPenalty>The holder takes @HealthLossPercent@% of their maximum Health in true damage at the beginning of combat or upon being equipped.</TFTShadowItemPenalty>

Caustic Deathblade.description: Contributing to a kill grants the holder %i:scaleAD% <TFTShadowItemBonus>@ADPerStack@ Attack Damage</TFTShadowItemBonus> for the rest of combat. This effect can stack any number of times (starting at @StartingStacks@).

Trickster's Gloves.description:
At the beginning of each planning phase, the holder equips 2 temporary items. These are always full shadow items.

[Consumes Three Item Slots]

Rapid Deathcannon.description:
Increases the holder's Attack Range by @HexRangeIncrease@ hex. Additionally, the holder gains %i:scaleAS% +@BonusAS@% bonus Attack Speed when there are no enemies within @HexRequirement@ hex.

The holder's attacks can no longer miss.

Titan's Revenge.description: @PercentDamage@% of incoming damage is stored. Every @SecondsBetweenProcs@ seconds, the holder's next attack unleashes this stored damage as true damage.

Frozen Dark Heart.description:
Reduces the Attack Speed of all enemies within @HexRadius@ hexes by @AttackSpeedSlow@%.

[Unique - only one per champion]

Ionic Dark-Spark.description: Enemies within @HexRange@ hexes have their Magic Resist reduced by @MRShred@%. When they cast an Ability, they are zapped taking magic damage equal to @ManaRatio@% of their max Mana.

Eclipse Cape.description:
Every @ICD@ second(s), a random enemy within @HexRange@ hexes is burned for @BurnPercent@% of their maximum Health as true damage over @BurnDuration@ seconds. Any healing they receive is reduced by @GrievousWoundsPercent@%.

[Unique - only one per champion]

Runaan's Untamed Hurricane.description: The holder's attacks fire bolts at <TFTShadowItemBonus>@AdditionalTargets@ nearby enemies</TFTShadowItemBonus>, dealing <TFTShadowItemPenalty>@MultiplierForDamage@% of the holder's Attack Damage.</TFTShadowItemPenalty> These bolts can critically strike but do not apply on-hit effects.

Force of Darkness.description: The holder's team gains <TFTShadowItemBonus>+@MaxArmySizeIncrease@</TFTShadowItemBonus> maximum team size, but <TFTShadowItemPenalty>the player's Little Legend takes +@PercentDamageIncrease@% damage after losing a battle</TFTShadowItemPenalty>.

Fallen Guardian Angel.description:
Prevents the holder's first death, placing them in stasis instead. After @StasisDuration@ seconds, they return with @HealthRestorePercent@% Health and shed all negative effects.

[Unique - only one per champion]

Spectral Giantslayer.description: The holder's Abilities and attacks do @SmallBonusPct@% bonus damage. If the target has more than @HealthThreshold@ maximum Health, the bonus increases to @LargeBonusPct@%.

Unstable Zz'Rot Portal.description:
At the start of combat, the holder taunts enemies within @HexRadius@ hexes.

When the holder dies, an Unstable Voidspawn with @ZombieHealth@ Health arises and taunts enemies again. When it dies it deals @ExplosionDamage@ true damage to enemies within @ExplosionHexRange@ hex(es).

Voidspawns that arise from summoned units are @SummonedStatReduction@% effective.

Hextech Gunblade Of Immortality.description: The holder's magic and true damage from Abilities heals the ally with lowest percent Health for <TFTShadowItemBonus>@OmniVamp@% of the damage dealt.</TFTShadowItemBonus> <TFTShadowItemPenalty>This heal cannot affect the holder.</TFTShadowItemPenalty>

Banshee's Claw.description:
When combat begins, the holder and all allies within @HexRange@ hexes in the same row gain a shield that blocks the first enemy Ability.

[Unique - only one per champion]

Guinsoo's Sacrificial Rageblade.description: Attacks grant <TFTShadowItemBonus>+@AttackSpeedPerStack@%</TFTShadowItemBonus> bonus Attack Speed for the rest of combat. The bonus Attack Speed can stack any number of times.

Mor-evil-lonomicon.description:
When the holder deals magic or true damage with their Ability, they burn the target, dealing @BurnPercent@% of the target's maximum Health as true damage over @BurnDuration@ seconds, and reducing healing by @GrievousWoundsPercent@% for the duration of the burn.

[Unique - only one per champion]
